title: Senior utvecklare inom IT
description:
**Vill du bygga robusta, skalbara och affärskritiska system som gör verklig skillnad inom gruv- och försvarsindustrin? Enheten IT i Norrköping och Linköping utvecklar långsiktiga systemlösningar med hög kvalitet – från infrastruktur till applikation. Vi växer och söker nu seniora fullstackutvecklare, gärna med gedigen .NET-erfarenhet, som vill ta helhetsansvar från krav till produktion i uppdrag som ofta drivs** **inhouse****.**

 **Din roll som senior konsult inom IT**


Som senior konsult inom infrastruktur och mjukvaruutveckling arbetar du med kravanalys, arkitektur, implementering och verifiering av avancerade tekniska miljöer. Du rör dig obehindrat mellan strategi och hands-on, översätter verksamhetsbehov till hållbara tekniska lösningar och ser till att de håller i verkligheten. I praktiken innebär det att du designar lösningar i moln, on-prem eller edge med fokus på tillförlitlighet, säkerhet och spårbarhet, bygger och testar kod – ofta i C#/.NET och moderna frontendlager – sätter upp och förvaltar CI/CD-flöden med automatiserade tester samt automatiserar miljöer och infrastruktur för snabb och konsekvent leverans.

  

Du kommer få arbeta både med våra interna arbets- och utvecklingsmiljöer och i kunduppdrag. Flera av våra projekt bedrivs inhouse, vilket gör att vi äger metodik och arbetssätt och kan balansera agilitet med nödvändig systematik.

 **Vem är du?**


Vi söker dig som har en eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT, gärna från ett ingenjörsprogram och håller dig ajour med den senaste tekniken. Därmed är inte molnteknologier främmande för dig.

  

Vi ser att DevOps kommer naturligt för dig och du trivs lika bra i en modern IDE likväl som uppbyggnad av CI/CD-kedjor. Du är van vid att hantera avvägningar och svarar ofta ”det beror på” – inte som ett tveksamt svar, utan som en välgrundad utgångspunkt där du kan förklara konsekvenserna av olika val. Vi ser att du är intresserad av automation och har ett agilt mindset.

  

Som person är du kommunikativ, samarbetar gärna med andra och har lätt för att paketera effektiva, robusta lösningar utan att tappa helhetsbilden.

 **Då tjänsten innebär arbete som omfattas av försvarssekretess krävs det att du genomför och godkänns i en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll.**

 **Urval****sker****löpande****. Vi ser** **fram****emot** **din** **ansökan****!**

**Kom & gör skillnad**


På Combitech har vi ett löfte: vi investerar i våra medarbetare. Våra kunder förväntar sig att vi ska ligga i absolut framkant och kunna lösa även de svåraste problemen, därför behöver vi ständigt utvecklas, som företag, som team, och som individer.


Hos oss har du möjlighet att göra karriär och utmana dig själv som ledare, men också fördjupa din expertis och din domänkunskap. Vi brukar säga att här kan du byta jobb utan att byta arbetsgivare. Du kan arbeta med en mängd olika sektorer, branscher, tekniker, uppdragsgivare och projekt.

  

Vill du veta mer om hur det är att arbeta hos oss?

  

Kontaktperson: Mattias Adelman, mattias.adelman (@) combitech.com

  

Vi undanber oss rekryteringssamarbeten

title: Senior Systemutvecklare -Uppdrag till stor kund i Stockholm
description:
#### **Vi söker nu Senior systemutvecklare till en stor myndighet i Stockholm**

##### **Omfattning: 100% (möjlighet till distansarbete upp till 50%)**

##### **Uppdragsperiod. 2026-03-30 - 2028-03-29**

##### **Uppdraget kan komma att förlängas 1-2 år.**

##### **kompetensnivå 3 (5-9 år)**

###### **Sök omgående, dock senast den 8 mars 2026**


Urval och intervjuer sker löpande, tjänsten kan därför tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag.


##### **Uppdragsbeskrivning**


Ett av myndighetens stora och viktiga program är i genomförandefasen och behöver förstärkning av en senior systemutvecklare med ledarerfarenhet och -kompetens. Uppdraget innefattar att utföra arbetsuppgifter kopplade till utveckling, underhåll och support av systemlösningar i projekt och förvaltningar, t.ex. att designa, bygga, testa och förvalta applikationer för styrsystem. Det dagliga arbetet handlar om att vara en del av ett agilt team.


﻿Det pågår ett omfattande arbete med att öka digitaliseringen för att kunna leva upp till energiomställningen med övergång till förnyelsebar energi bl.a. genom att realisera metoder för simulering och styrning. Kunden behöver i detta arbete stöd av en senior systemutvecklare som kodar och samtidigt leder. Tekniker och plattformar som exempelvis används är Python, React, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy. Arbetet utförs i agilt team där bland annat roller som kravanalytiker, systemutvecklare och testare ingår.


﻿Konsulten ska vara van att arbeta i team med projektledare, lösningsarkitekt och produktägare.


﻿Det kan även bli aktuellt att arbeta med andra utvecklings- och implementeringsprojekt inom divisionens verksamhetsområden. Konsulten kommer att tillhöra avdelningen IT för Kraftsystem & Elmarknad, som är en avdelning under division IT.


﻿


﻿**Arbetsuppgifter**


Rollen som systemutvecklare i projekt och förvaltningar kan bl.a. omfatta följande huvuduppgifter:

* Bidra till att tolka arkitektur, säkerhet och designa system
* Genomföra utveckling av system, i huvudsak backend men även frontend
* Agera i rollen som scrummaster och säkerställa att teamet följer scrum-ramverket och agila principer
* Agera som scrummaster för det agila teamet, koordinera det dagliga arbetet samt förvalta backloggen i samråd med kravanalytikern och produktägare
* Konfiguration av CI/CD-miljö
* Ta fram, uppdatera och förvalta systemdokumentation
* Förekommande förvaltning så som hantera incidenter, där felsökning och buggrättning kan ingå, samt bistå i övrigt i IT-förvaltningen av våra applikationer och annat driftrelaterat arbete
**Placeringsort: Sundbyberg**

**Säkerhetsprövning** och registerkontroll krävs

title: Konsultuppdrag | Solution Developer – Master Data Management
description:
**Profile/Role:** Solution Developer – Master Data Management  

**Expected years of experience:** Level 3 (minimum 7+ years)  

**Language skills:** English and Swedish mandatory  

**Utilization:** 100%
  

**Start date:** 18-05-2026 or sooner if possible  

**End date:** 14-05-2027  

**Location/remote availability:** Flexible, 3 days per week in the office

 **About the Role:**


We are looking for an experienced Solution Developer to participate in the building of our new Master Data Management (MDM) platform. You will be part of a team building the operational MDM as well as the 3rd party system and source connectors.

 **Requirements:**

**Distributed Systems & Architecture**

* Extensive experience building distributed systems, data platforms, or large scale microservice architectures
* Deep knowledge of event driven patterns and Apache Kafka
* Ability to translate technical designs into high integrity solutions

**Software Engineering**

* Strong software engineering capabilities
* Proficiency in Java, Kotlin, TypeScript or similar languages
* Practical expertise in:


	+ Microservices
	+ Kubernetes
	+ Infrastructure as code
	+ CI/CD
	+ API design

**Cloud & Observability**

* Experience with AWS or GCP
* Familiarity with observability tooling such as:


	+ Grafana
	+ Datadog
	+ Prometheus
* OpenShift considered a valuable plus

**Collaboration**

* Strong communication and collaboration skills
* Comfortable leading discussions
* Experience contributing in agile, iterative environments

 **Om oss**

*Senterprise är ett ledande rekryteringsbolag inom IT och en oberoende förmedlare av frilansande konsulter. Med aktiv headhunting, search och djup teknisk förståelse hjälper vi några av Sveriges främsta arbetsgivare att hitta rätt kandidater, både för anställning och konsultuppdrag.*

*Läs vidare på* *www.senterprise.se*

title: Junior Identity Security Developer
description:
#### **Junior Identity Security Developer (SailPoint/Opentext) – Service Delivery**


Är du i början av din karriär inom IT och vill arbeta med framtidens säkerhetslösningar? Vill du utvecklas inom identitetssäkerhet tillsammans med några av de främsta experterna i Norden? Då kan detta vara rollen för dig.


ID North erbjuder produkter och tjänster inom hela området för identitetssäkerhet (IAM, IGA, PAM), vilket är en central del av modern IT-säkerhet. Vi är ett ledande företag i Sverige och fortsätter att växa i hela Norden.


Nu söker vi **juniora lösningsutvecklare till vår Service Delivery-organisation**, där du kommer arbeta med att **förvalta, vidareutveckla och supportera identitetssäkerhetslösningar hos våra kunder**.


Hos oss får du arbeta tillsammans med erfarna specialister och utvecklas inom ett av de snabbast växande områdena inom IT-säkerhet.

##### **Din roll**

Som **Junior Identity Security Developer** blir du en del av vårt **Service Delivery-team**, som ansvarar för att säkerställa stabil drift, vidareutveckling och support av våra kunders identitetssäkerhetslösningar enligt våra förvaltningsavtal.


Du kommer arbeta tillsammans med andra utvecklare och specialister som stöttar dig i din tekniska utveckling.


Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:

* Vidareutveckla och konfigurera identitetssäkerhetslösningar baserade på SailPoint/Opentext
* Arbeta med förvaltning och förbättring av befintliga IAM/IGA-lösningar
* Hantera supportärenden och felsökning i kundernas miljöer
* Arbeta med integrationer mellan olika IT-system
* Bidra till stabil drift och kontinuerlig förbättring av lösningar
* Samarbeta nära både kollegor och kunder


Rollen ger dig möjlighet att bygga upp **djup teknisk kompetens inom identitetssäkerhet och systemintegration**.

##### **Kvalifikationer**

###### **Skallkrav**

* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom **systemvetenskap, informationssäkerhet eller liknande IT-utbildning**
* Intresse för IT-säkerhet och tekniska system
* Goda kunskaper i **svenska och engelska**, både i tal och skrift

###### **Meriterande**

* Kunskap eller intresse för **Identity & Access Management (IAM), IGA eller PAM**
* Erfarenhet av **SailPoint eller andra IAM-lösningar**
* Grundläggande kunskaper inom:


	+ Active Directory / LDAP
	+ API:er eller webbtjänster
	+ autentiseringsstandarder (SAML, OAuth, OpenID Connect)
* Programmeringskunskaper eller script (t.ex. Java eller liknande)
* Erfarenhet av Linux- eller Windowsmiljöer
* Kunskap om Git eller andra versionshanteringssystem

##### **Dina personliga egenskaper**

Vi tror att du:

* Är **nyfiken och vill lära dig nya tekniker**
* Tycker om att **felsöka och lösa tekniska problem**
* Trivs med att **arbeta i team**
* Är **strukturerad och ansvarstagande**
* Har ett **serviceinriktat arbetssätt** gentemot kunder och kollegor


Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och din vilja att utvecklas.

##### **Vi erbjuder**

Hos ID North blir du en del av ett specialistbolag i framkant inom identitetssäkerhet.


Vi erbjuder:

* Möjlighet att utvecklas inom ett **mycket efterfrågat område inom IT-säkerhet**
* Arbete tillsammans med **erfarna specialister**
* Intern kompetensutveckling och certifieringar
* Långsiktiga kundrelationer och tekniskt utmanande miljöer
* En inkluderande kultur där vi trivs och utvecklas tillsammans


Vi har kontor i **Stockholm, Borås, Göteborg och Helsingfors**, och placeringsort kan vara flexibel beroende på din situation.

##### **Ansökan**


Låter detta som en tjänst för dig?


Vi rekryterar löpande och har ett omgående behov så skicka gärna in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.


Välkommen till ID North!

**Kontakt:**  

Chief Human Resources Officer  

Linda Öhlin

title: Backend Developer who knows Kafka is more than an author
description:
Are you a backend developer who enjoys turning messy systems into something clean and reliable? Do you believe knowledge grows when it’s shared, not guarded? And would you like your code to help thousands of consumers make better shopping decisions every day? Then you might be our next Backend Developer in Malmö.


At Prisjakt, we bring clarity to the chaos of e-commerce. From our Malmö office, you’ll build services that automate content creation and validate offer data. In other words, your code will directly improve data quality and help make online shopping a little smarter.

###### **What you’ll be doing**

* Build and maintain Scala-based services that automate content creation and validate large amounts of offer data
* Develop backend-heavy solutions with some frontend parts used by our operations team
* Work in a microservice architecture powered by Kafka and running on Kubernetes
* Collaborate closely with developers, product and operations to improve data quality in smart, scalable ways
* Share knowledge, coach teammates and raise the bar for how we build things
* This isn’t about shipping code and disappearing. You’ll be part of shaping how we solve problems together.

###### **Who you are**


You’re experienced enough to feel confident in your craft and humble enough to know great solutions are built in dialogue. You prefer multiplayer mode over solo speedruns and you’re comfortable discussing trade-offs, architecture and design decisions.

###### **To thrive here, you:**

* Are skilled in Scala (or strong in Java and genuinely want to move into Scala)
* Have a solid understanding of microservice architecture
* Know your way around Kafka and Kubernetes
* You are well known with Docker and GCP
* Communicate clearly in English and it is a plus if you speak Swedish


You likely have experience mentoring others or naturally step into that role when needed. Not because it sounds good on paper but because you care about the team succeeding as much as the code compiling.


We don’t care whether you learned this through a master’s degree, open-source contributions, or years of building things the hard way. What matters is what you know, how you think, and how you apply it.

###### **What you get at Prisjakt**


At Prisjakt, honesty, curiosity and care guide both our product and how we treat each other. You won’t need a “work persona” here. Just bring your real self and your engineering brain.


You’ll join a supportive tech community in Malmö, work on meaningful problems at scale, and have real influence over technical decisions. We won’t promise that every sprint is perfect — but we will promise interesting challenges, smart colleagues, and a culture where sharing knowledge is the default setting.


If that sounds like your kind of backend adventure, let’s talk.

title: Backend Developer
description:
Hi there! 👋
   

  

 We are Alf – a newly formed tech company within Länsförsäkringar Alliance. With a client base of approximately 2 million households, Länsförsäkringar is one of Sweden’s biggest financial groups. Alf is on a mission to create a secure and sustainable way of living by adding cutting-edge IoT tech to 200+ years of experience from helping customers taking care of their homes.
   

  

**About the job** 
 As a Backend Developer at Alf, you’ll be part of a cross-functional
 **product team** 
 building backend services for customer-facing IoT products. You’ll work close to both the product and its users, taking responsibility from design to production in a system where backend quality truly matters.
   

  

 Our backend is event-driven, business-critical, and integrated with connected devices. The role suits
 **someone who enjoys working end-to-end** 
 , combining feature development with platform improvements. You’ll collaborate closely with frontend and app developers, QA, and the PM to deliver high-quality solutions.
   

  

 We work in
 **two-week sprints** 
 with daily stand-ups, backlog refinement, sprint planning, demos, and retrospectives. Backend developers join chapter meetings to collaborate, share knowledge, and shape the platform together. We value scalable solutions and place emphasis on test automation.
   

  

 The role includes
 **occasional on-call duties** 
 , which are of course, fully compensated.
   

  

**About you** 
 We’re looking for an experienced backend developer with a bachelor’s degree in computer science or a related field, who thrives in a collaborative team and enjoys taking ownership of their work. You’re curious, solution-oriented, and passionate about writing clean, reliable code. You stay up-to-date with modern development practices and are motivated by making a real impact for users.
   

  

**You bring:**
* At least: 3-4 years of backend development experience
* Experience with event-driven systems
* Experience with REST APIs, PostgreSQL (or similar relational databases), and MongoDB (or similar NoSQL databases)


**Nice to haves:**
* Experience with Node.js
* Experience with RabbitMQ
* Experience with Kubernetes and Docker containers
* Experience with IoT


**About Alf** 
 Länsförsäkringar embodies more than 200 years of dedication to create safety for our customers. With Alf, all that experience is being combined with innovative technology to cater the current needs of our clients. It’s a full-service solution providing personalized insights, advice and content, which enables the users to proactively take care of and protect their homes. With Alf and Länsförsäkringar, safety and sustainability go hand in hand.
   

  

 Alf is operated by Länsförsäkringar Trygghetstjänster AB, a company owned by Länsförsäkringar Alliance. This provides a unique opportunity to become part of an engaged and fun team at an innovative tech company, characterised by the agile and dynamic essence of a startup, all while being supported by the stability and strength of Länsförsäkringar Alliance.
   

  

**With Alf and Länsförsäkringar, you will get:**
**🏡** 
 Work-life balance through a hybrid model
   

  

 🏙️ Centrally located office in Stockholm
   

  

 🤝 Collective agreement including pension and insurance coverage
   

  

 🤸 Wellness allowance of 5000 SEK/year
   

  

 💸 Special banking perks
   

  

 🚀…and more, but let us dive into that when we meet in person!
   

  

**How To Apply.**
 Apply by sending us your CV in Swedish or English. Our selection process is continuous, and we may move forward with candidates on an ongoing basis. Looking forward to hearing from you!
   

  

*To ensure a high level of trust with our customers, a background check will be conducted at the final stage of the recruitment process.*

title: Backend Developer Intern
description:
**Backend Developer Intern — Remote | XR Solutions** 




  





**Who we are** 




 We build AR tools for industrial environments — factory floors, heavy machinery, complex maintenance workflows. Machine learning makes them smart, and our engineering team makes them reliable. We're a small company, which means less bureaucracy and more ownership. Everything we build goes to production and gets used by real people.
 



  





**The role** 




 You'll work alongside experienced developers to build and maintain the backend services behind our AR platform. This isn't a "shadow someone and take notes" kind of internship — you'll be writing production code from the start.
 



  





 You'll work with:
 


* Node.js & Express for building REST APIs
* PostgreSQL & Sequelize for database design and queries
* AWS for cloud infrastructure and deployment
* Git (we use Bitbucket) for version control



  





**What your week actually looks like** 



* Building and maintaining APIs that our AR applications rely on
* Designing database schemas and keeping queries fast
* Connecting backend services to ML pipelines and AR-facing systems
* Writing unit and integration tests — we don't ship what we can't verify
* Participating in code reviews, both giving and receiving feedback
* Picking up DevOps tasks as you get more comfortable with AWS



  





**What we're looking for** 




 Someone comfortable with Node.js, Express, and TypeScript. PostgreSQL experience helps — even if it's from personal or school projects. You should know your way around Git and understand the basics of how APIs work under the hood. If you've used AWS, CI/CD pipelines, or Sequelize before, that's a nice bonus, but we'll teach what's missing.
 



 More than tools, we care that you're genuinely curious, write clean code, and learn quickly without needing everything spelled out.
 



  





  





 This starts as an unpaid position. People who do strong, consistent work move into a paid role. We know unpaid is a big ask, so we take the experience side seriously — real production code, real mentorship, and real exposure to how scalable systems are built and maintained.
 



  





**What you walk away with** 



* Backend experience on a live, shipped product — not a sandbox project
* Working knowledge of AWS, API design, and cloud architecture in production
* Solid testing and security fundamentals you'll use everywhere
* And if things go well — a paid role on the team



  





 If you’re excited about this opportunity and eager to learn, please send your resume outlining your interest in the position. We look forward to helping you grow your skills and advance your career in backend development.

title: Fullstack utvecklare
description:
Vi är Sveriges största app och marknadsplats för bokning av skönhets- och hälsotjänster. Som ett SaaS-företag med branschledande mjukvara har vi över 14 000 anslutna specialister över hela landet. Vi gör nästan alla Sveriges salonger och kliniker bokningsbara på ett och samma ställe – inklusive frisörer, massörer, fotvårdare, skönhetssalonger, kiropraktorer och många fler.
   

  

 På bokadirekt.se kan konsumenter söka, boka och betala för behandlingar och tjänster med bara några få klick. Varje månad besöks vår plattform av över 5 miljoner konsumenter, och nästan 2 miljoner bokningar görs via vår webbplats och våra appar. Bokadirekt växer snabbt och har för närvarande över 100 anställda med kontor i Stockholm och Luleå.
   

  

**Vad vi söker** 
 Vi söker en driven och erfaren Fullstack utvecklare till vårt växande tech-team på Bokadirekt – Sveriges ledande plattform för onlinebokningar och betalningar inom skönhet och hälsa.
   

  

 I den här rollen blir du en nyckelspelare i vårt Marknadsplats-team. Medan våra interna verktyg driver organisationen framåt, kommer du att bygga Bokadirekts "skyltfönster" – den högfrekventa plattform som miljontals konsumenter använder för att hitta och boka sina tider. Du kommer att fokusera på att skapa sömlösa, högpresterande användarupplevelser som sammanför över 5 miljoner månatliga besökare med fler än 20 000 specialister.
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta nära produktägare och UX-designers för att omsätta konsumenternas behov till robusta och skalbara funktioner. I takt med att vi växer kommer du att spela en avgörande roll i att säkerställa att vår marknadsplats är snabb, intuitiv och byggd för framtiden.
   

  

 Som Fullstack-utvecklare i teamet tar du ägarskap över hela utvecklingsprocessen – från systemarkitektur och databasdesign till teknisk implementering. Du kommer att tillbringa merparten av din tid med Node.js, React och MySQL.
   

  

**Vad du kommer att göra**
* Utveckla och underhålla vår konsumentinriktade marknadsplatsplattform.
* Bygga och optimera en responsiv och högpresterande frontends med React.
* Designa och implementera skalbara backend-tjänster med Node.js.
* Arbeta med MySQL och Redis Cache för att designa och optimera databasstrukturer för miljöer med hög trafik.
* Bidra till teknisk design och arkitektoniska beslut för marknadsplatsens ekosystem.
* Samarbeta tätt med produktägare, designers och andra utvecklare.
* Kontinuerligt förbättra kodkvalitet, prestanda och leveransprocesser.


**Vem du är**
* 5+ års erfarenhet av arbete som fullstack-utvecklare.
* Gedigen erfarenhet av Node.js och React.
* Stark kompetens inom MySQL och databasutveckling.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med Redis Cache.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i en agil teammiljö.
* Ett proaktivt mindset – du är driven, ansvarstagande och fokuserad på leverans.
* Professionell färdighet i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.


**Meriterande:**
* Erfarenhet av Elasticsearch.
* Examen inom datavetenskap eller liknande tekniskt område.
* Erfarenhet av AWS eller andra molnplattformar.
* Kunskap om CI/CD-pipelines och DevOps-principer.
* Erfarenhet av mikrotjänstarkitektur (microservices).
* Moderna CSS-ramverk och "mobile-first"-design.


**Vad vi erbjuder**
* Chansen att påverka vår arkitektur, tech-stack och produktinriktning.
* En kultur som bygger på samarbete, ägarskap och innovation.
* Flexibla arbetstider och ett hybridupplägg för distansarbete.
* Modern kontorslokal i centrala Stockholm.
* Konkurrenskraftig lön och förmånspaket.


**Om tjänsten**
* Startdatum: Enligt överenskommelse / Så snart som möjligt
* Plats: Centrala Stockholm (Hybrid)
* Anställningsform: Heltid, tillsvidare


****Ansökan****
 Skicka in ditt CV så snart som möjligt, vi ser fram emot att lära känna dig!
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!**

title: Product Developer
description:
**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU’LL DO**




 In this role as a Product Developer, you’ll play an important part in shaping the H&M assortment. You will define and execute both short‑ and long‑term strategies for your category, ensuring alignment with our overall assortment goals. Leveraging your fashion intelligence, salesmanship and commercial insight, you’ll drive seasonal keys and act on emerging trends. You will continuously refine our product and component strategy to drive growth and profitability.
   

  





 In this position you will drive initiatives forward, ensuring seamless execution and effective cross‑team collaboration in a fast‑paced environment. You’ll work closely with a talented team including a product manager, planner, designer and pattern maker, as well as collaborating with the production team. With your strong passion for product and fashion, you will be essential in creating world‑class products that resonate with our customers.
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE**




**Qualifications**



* 5+ years of experience from a similar role as Product Developer for garments, shoes or accessories
* Education in Textiles, Buying or Product Development
* Proven track record in creating strong and commercially relevant products, with excellent fashion sense
* A keen eye for current fashion trends and strong fashion intelligence
* A deep passion for products and product development
* Extensive material knowledge
* Driven, structured and proactive in taking initiative
* Strong salesmanship and results‑oriented mindset
* Excellent communication skills
* A collaborative team player with a flexible attitude
* Ability to identify opportunities, improvements and efficient solutions



**WHO WE ARE** 
  

  

  

  

 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  





  

  





**JOIN US​**




 Additional information:
   

  





 This is a full-time position, with placement in Stockholm. If you feel your experience, skills and ambitions are right for this role, please send your application including
 **CV in English as soon as possible** 
 . Interviews will be held continuously. (For internal candidates, please initiate a dialogue with you manager before applying.)  If you are currently in a permanent employment with H&M you will keep your permanent employment even if you take on a temporary position for a limited time.
   

  





 Benefits:
   

  





 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP.
   

  





 Inclusion & Diversity:
   

  





 H&M is a part of H&M Group. At H&M Group, we’re determined to create and maintain inclusive, diverse and equitable workplaces throughout our organisation. Our teams should consist of a variety of people that share and combine their knowledge, experience and ideas. Having a diverse workforce leads to a positive impact on how we address challenges, on what we perceive possible and on how we choose to relate to our colleagues and customers all over the world. Hence all diversity dimensions are taken into consideration in our recruitment process.
   

  





 We strive to have a fair and equal process and therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application as they often contain information that easily can trigger unintentional biases.
   

  





**​ Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​**

title: Software Engineer
description:
We are seeking an experienced Developer with strong Python and cloud-native experience to join our team. In this role, you will work across the full development cycle, collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver innovative, scalable, and high-performing backend solutions using AWS Serverless technologies.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Develop and maintain backend services using AWS Serverless architecture.
* Implement scalable and reliable solutions with Python.
* Design and build services that support data-driven and event-based architectures.
* Work with AWS storage and database services to enable application functionality.
* Troubleshoot, optimize, and enhance backend systems to ensure high availability and performance.
* Collaborate with developers, architects, product owners, and DevOps teams to align technical solutions with business needs.
* Contribute to CI/CD automation and improve deployment workflows.
* Ensure solutions follow best practices for security, scalability, and maintainability.



  





**We Are Looking For You Who Have:** 



* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Engineering, or a related field
* Python backend development experience.
* Experience building scalable backend systems in cloud environments.
* Hands-on expertise with AWS Serverless technologies
* Familiarity with event-driven architectures and cloud-native development practices.
* Experience with AWS databases and storage solutions, relational databases (PostgreSQL oror SQL).
* Knowledge of Git and CI/CD pipelines, preferably GitLab CI/CD.



  





**It Will Be a Great Plus If You Have:** 



* Fluency in Swedish
* Experience with Angular or React.
* Knowledge of event-driven architecture patterns or Domain Driven Design (DDD).
* Experience building microservices in cloud environments.
* Experience in large-scale enterprise projects.



  





*Don’t wait to apply — we’re actively reviewing candidates as applications come in.* 




  





**What we offer you?** 




 Every employee is equally valuable in the success of ALTEN! We believe in growing together by offering opportunities, development and togetherness.
 



 ALTEN operates in several different industries, having a wide variety of assignments, coaching managers and training through ALTEN Academy, which means that it will always be possible to develop at ALTEN. Your wishes will guide your way forward.
 



 As a consultant, you will get the genuine team feeling at your assignment but also a wonderful togetherness at ALTEN. Through our different internal networks, such as Women@ALTEN and ALTEN Sports you will get the opportunity to drive topics and activities that are close to your heart. At ALTEN, we think it's important to have a balance between work and spare time, which is why we offer three extra days off a year. We have a collective agreement and offer benefits like pension, insurances and wellness grants.
 



  





**About ALTEN** 




 ALTEN is one of Europe’s largest technology and IT consulting companies with over 57,000 employees in nearly 30 countries. Our engineers carry out complex and highly technical projects throughout the value chain of the most prestigious companies in all sectors, such as Automotive, Defense, Energy & Environment, Industry, Public services & Government and Life Sciences. In Sweden, we are about 1300 committed employees with 9 offices in 9 cities - from Lund in the south to Skellefteå in the north.
 



 For the fifth year in a row, ALTEN has been named one of Sweden's most attractive employers by Karriärföretagen, an award for employers that offer unique career and development opportunities.
 



 Welcome to read more about us at alten.se

title: Software Engineer
description:
**What You’ll Do At Elekta**
 At Elekta, you will make a difference. We are seeking a Software Engineer for our team developing the Control System for the Leksell Gamma Knife within the Neuro Solutions Business Line.
   

  

 The Control System for Leksell Gamma Knife manages accurate and safe delivery of radiation treatment to the patient. It spans from the operator’s user interface to the subsystems that drive the real-time embedded and mechatronic components. It controls operator workflows, treatment targeting, imaging, safety functions and communication. You’ll work hands-on with both new development and maintenance of a safety-critical system in a regulated medtech environment.
   

  

 You will be part of a collaborative team of Software Engineers, working in our beautiful new office at "Forskaren" in Stockholm city.
   

  

**What You’ll Work On**
 You’ll join a cross-functional engineering team and work closely with experienced developers who will help you develop your skills. We value collaboration, open communication and a supportive environment where everyone’s ideas are heard. Your work will focus on building and improving software that directly impacts patient treatment.
   

  

 You will grow into a role where you will:
   

  

* Develop C++ features that support both user workflows and the interaction with underlying hardware.
* Participate in the configuration of the Windows IoT and real-time embedded subsystems to enable system connectivity and fulfil cybersecurity requirements.
* Contribute to the full development process: requirements, design, implementation, testing and documentation.
* Collaborate with developers, testers, and the product owner as part of an agile team as well as specialists and stakeholders outside the team.
* Participate in design reviews and code reviews to strengthen quality and consistency of code and documentation.
* Explore new approaches and tools that can simplify or improve our work.
* Learn how complex medtech systems are designed and validated.


**Who You Are**
 This is a role where you can start junior, newly graduated or up to four years of experience. We don’t expect you to know everything on day one; you will be able to grow into the role by working closely with experienced engineers supporting you through pair programming, code reviews and knowledge-sharing.
   

  

 We think you’ll thrive if you:
   

  

* Have an interest in C++ development and want to deepen your expertise.
* Are curious about both application-level workflows and embedded system development.
* Enjoy exploring practical engineering challenges.
* Are social, communicate well and appreciate teamwork.
* Want to work in a regulated medtech environment to do meaningful work that improves patient treatment.


 We also expect that you have:
   

  

* B.Sc. or M.Sc. in Computer Science, Engineering Physics, Mechatronics or similar.
* Professional proficiency in English
* Valid work permit for Sweden.


 Prior experience with safety-critical coding, Qt, Windows IoT, ThreadX, Python, or device communication protocols is an advantage, but not required.
   

  

**Hiring process**
 We are looking forward to hearing from you! Apply by submitting your application and résumé in English, via the “Apply” button. Please note that we do not accept applications by e-mail.
   

  

 We will review applications on a rolling basis, last day for applying is March 8th, 2026.
   

  

**Your Elekta contact**
 For questions, please contact Anders Becker,

title: Software Engineer
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsultkollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Du har flera års erfarenhet av backendutveckling, främst i Python.
* Du har erfarenhet av Kubernetes-plattformar.
* Du har erfarenhet av utveckling i Linux-miljöer.
* Du har erfarenhet av molnbaserade och distribuerade system.
* Du har förståelse för stora systemlandskap och hur olika komponenter integrerar.
* Du har stark samarbetsförmåga och vana att dela kunskap inom team.


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 12-03-2026
   

  

**Om Oss**
 Att jobba på Deploja är något helt annat än att arbeta på ett vanligt konsultbolag – och det är vi riktigt stolta över. Vad är det då som gör oss unika?
   

  

 Vi erbjuder helt enkelt mer än bara hög lön och större frihet, det är bara början. Hos oss hittar du den arbetsmiljö och de möjligheter du förtjänar. Här påverkar du din egen lön som helt och hållet som baseras på ditt timpris mot kund.
   

  

 Vår lönemodell är en hybridlösning mellan en fast månadslön och en provisionsbaserad ersättning. Det innebär att din månadslön baseras på ditt timpris, fast om du mot förmodan skulle stå utan uppdrag så behåller du en grund lön fram tills vi hittat ett nytt uppdrag, bra va?
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 🚗 Tjänstebil – vi uppmuntrar dig att välja en elbil för en mer hållbar framtid.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Back End Developer
description:
**Senior .NET Developer Opportunity - Non-for-profit Sector - Stockholm** 




  





 I am looking for a senior .NET developer to join a mid-sized company in the public sector. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in .NET, Azure, and building integration-focused solutions, helping connect critical systems and services across the organization.
 



  





 You'll play a key role in developing scalable integration platforms and ensuring reliable, maintainable data flows between systems.
 



  





 This is a really exciting time to join as the team is undergoing a major transformation project, modernising their IT systems and evolving their integrations landscape. This means you'll have an amazing opportunity to make a genuine and meaningful impact on both the technology and the organisation.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  




* Design, develop, and maintain robust integration services and APIs using .NET and Azure.
* Build and manage event-driven and serverless integrations using tolls such as Azure Functions and Azure ServiceBus.
* Implement Infrastructure as Code to provision and manage cloud resources.
* Work closely with the wider IT department to enable reliable integrations between internal platforms and third-party systems.
* Contribute to the performance, scalability, and security of the organization's integration platform.



  





**Requirements:** 




  




* 5+ years' experience working with .NET/C# in a backend or integration-focused role.
* Experience building cloud-native applications or integrations on Azure.
* Strong understanding of event-driven architecture and messaging patterns.
* Experience working with Azure Functions, Azure Servicebus, and other Azure services.
* Experience working with IaC (e.g. Bicep, ARM, Terraform).



  





*This role requires candidates to speak fluent Swedish and cannot support visas.* 




  





**Why Join?** 




  




* As a company in the public sector, your work will contribute to real improvements in Swedish society and sustainability.
* Although this is a Swedish company, they are part of international communities, offering opportunities for global collaboration and conferences.
* The upcoming modernization and digitalization projects offer you the chance to make a real impact on the organization and your career growth.
* You'll be part of a supportive, team-oriented culture focused on delivering technology that makes a positive difference.



  





 Please apply via the Easy Apply function.
 



  





 For more information, please email l.letchford@tenthrevolution.com.
 



  





 The application deadline for this position is 27th of March, 2026. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, so early applications are encouraged.

title: Experienced Front-End Developer in Stockholm
description:
**Job Title**
 Experienced Front-End Developer in Stockholm
   

  

**Job Description**
*At Axis, we’ve always been about pushing the boundaries in pursuit of innovating for a smarter, safer world. We do this by developing IP-based products and innovations for security and video surveillance. We are expanding our Stockholm team and looking for a Frontend Developer to join us in developing innovative products and features using modern technologies!*
**The team**
 At Axis, our teams work cross-functionally in projects to develop and deliver world class products! The teams are small, empowered agile teams who support each other, cooperate to reach their goals together and foster an environment of collaboration and openness to new ideas. We believe diverse perspectives are key to innovation. And one thing for sure; teamwork, collaboration and openness to each other’s ideas are essential to everyone at Axis.
   

  

 Many of our teams have Innovation days and Free Fridays where you can freely experiment your ideas. We trust our teams to decide on the best ways of working, the tools to use, and which ideas to explore – a level of freedom that truly empowers our developers.
   

  

**The role**
 Your team is a new team with a mix of firmware engineers and back-end developers who work closely with UX designers and QA engineers. You will play an important role in the development of our new products by writing well designed, efficient, scalable, readable and testable code. Together with your team, you will be involved in setting the coding standards and ways of working for your team.
   

  

 You co-operate with co-workers in different disciplines especially as part of early feature investigations and pre-studies to evaluate technical solutions to problems.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 You are curious, love challenges and to solve them in a team focused atmosphere. We believe that you get inspired by working in an environment of openness, creativity, trust, commitment, playfulness and encouragement.
   

  

 You have a genuine interest in front-end development, new technologies including AI tools and you enjoy exploring new areas, always putting focus on the user experience. You enjoy working unpretentiously in a tight team and in that way learning from and sharing your expertise with your talented colleagues. You value creating a network of peers to discuss issues and designs, connecting with colleagues across our sites, whether in Stockholm, Lund, or elsewhere.
   

  

**We’d love to hear that you have:**
* Solid work experience in Typescript and React of which is ideally 2 years within product development
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in a relevant area, or equivalent practical experience
* Comfortable with Go and Figma
* Passion to work in small agile teams
* Experience of working in close collaboration with UX-designers to create the best possible user experience.
* Perhaps worked with either of the following: GraphQL/Urql, Vite, esbuild, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Vue


**What Axis Can Do For You**
 At Axis Stockholm we are a newer R&D site with 45+ engineers so far. You will be part of creating and maintaining the collaborative atmosphere and can influence how we want to work in our part of Axis.
   

  

 Axis is a world leader in network video, where cutting-edge technology meets global impact. Here, you’ll contribute to meaningful projects that shape the future of security and surveillance — developing solutions used worldwide.
   

  

 As a fast-growing company, we offer exciting career opportunities. You’ll grow professionally through continuous learning, supported by a collaborative team that values creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.
   

  

 Your well-being matters to us. We offer a range of benefits, including a company bonus, Friday cake, parental leave policies, wellness benefits, health insurance — and even your own Axis bicycle.
   

  

 To learn more about Axis, our innovative products, solutions, and vibrant company culture, explore:
   

  

 Life at Axis blog
   

  

 Engineering at Axis blog
   

  

 Innovation at Axis
   

  

**Ready to Act?**
 Axis is a company realizing the benefits of a diverse workforce. We know that diversity in groups creates a better working environment and promotes creativity, something that is fundamental for our success. We welcome all applications (CV and cover letter).
   

  

 We're looking for the real you, cover letters written in your own words are highly valued!
   

  

 We go through applications continuously so don’t wait – send in your application today!
   

  

 In case of questions, please reach out to recruiting manager Hanna Al-Maawali at +46 46 272 1800.
   

  

 Type of Employment
   

  

 Permanent Employment
   

  

 Posting End Date
   

  

 2026-03-12
   

  

*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* 
*Notice will be provided before we take any action.*
**About Axis Communications**
 We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.
   

  

 With around 5000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.
   

  

**Let´s create a smarter, safer world**
 For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.
   

  

 Listen to Get To Know Axis – Podcast

title: Python Developer
description:
Job Responsibilities
 





 \* Develop, and maintain backend services using AWS Serverless architecture.
 





 \* Implement solutions using Python, following best practices for performance, scalability, and reliability.
 





 \* Work with various AWS storage and database services to build robust data-driven applications.
 





 \* Troubleshoot, optimize, and enhance backend systems to ensure high availability and performance.
 





 \* Contribute to CI/CD automation and improve deployment workflows.
 





  
 





 Technical Skills & Qualifications
 





  
 





 \* Strong experience with AWS Serverless services (Lambda, Step Functions, API Gateway).
 





 \* Proficient in Python for backend development.
 





 \* Hands-on experience with AWS databases and storage (PostgreSQL or SQL).
 





 \* Good understanding of even drive architecture.
 





 \* Hands-on experience with AWS services (SQS, Event Bridge pipes, SNS)
 





 \* Good knowledge of IAC tools like (Terraform or Amazon CDK)
 





 \* Good understanding of Git for version control.
 





 \* Experience with CI/CD pipelines, preferably GitLab CI/CD.
 





  
 





 Additional Attributes
 





  
 





 \* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
 





 \* Good communication and collaboration abilities.
 





 \* Passion for building scalable, secure, and high-quality backend systems.
 





 \* Ability to work independently as well as in team settings.
 



* \* Experience in event driven architecture and DDD (domain driven design)

title: Backend & Platform Engineer
description:
**About the role** 

 Photowall is in an expansive phase, and we are now looking for a developer who is equally comfortable working with infrastructure and building backend features. You’ll write code in our PHP/Postgres stack while also shaping how our platform performs, scales, and stays reliable.
 



  




**Your focus will be on:** 
* Ensuring our platform performs reliably under high and varying traffic
* Driving performance improvements across database, cache, and application layers
* Managing and optimizing our AWS cloud environment
* Strengthening observability and monitoring across our systems
* Operating and tuning our web stack (Nginx, PHP-FPM)
* Developing new features in our PHP 8-based backend
* Taking part in designing and evolving our architecture, such as building new APIs
* Creating scalable and future-proof solutions to handle growing traffic and user demands
* Enhancing our CI/CD pipeline to streamline development workflows
* Collaborating closely with other developers, product owners, and designers


**What you need to know** 

 We believe you have at least 7 years of experience as a developer and enjoy a role where backend and platform development is the main focus. You’re comfortable tackling complex technical challenges and naturally consider scalability and performance in your work.
 



  




* At least 7 years of experience in backend or full-stack development
* Experience designing and operating scalable, high-availability systems
* Solid experience working with PHP or another backend language
* Strong knowledge of relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred)
* Experience working with caching solutions, such as Redis
* Understanding of and experience with CI/CD pipelines
* Strong collaboration skills and the ability to work in cross-functional teams


**Preferred Qualifications:** 
* Experience managing and optimizing cloud infrastructure, preferably on AWS
* Experience optimizing performance in scalable applications
* Experience with monitoring and observability tools
* Experience with large-scale traffic environments
* Experience with e-commerce
* TypeScript and React are a growing part of our stack, so experience with modern React frameworks such as Next.js is a plus
* Experience with image processing



  





 If you don't meet every requirement but are eager to learn, don't hesitate to apply anyway.
   




**Why Photowall?** 

 Photowall is a global leader in custom wallpaper and wall decor. We serve over 20 markets, and have ambitious plans for continued growth through geographic expansion and new product launches. At Photowall, you’ll find a dynamic environment with ample opportunities for professional development.
 



  





 You'll be joining a small, supportive team that aims for a no-stress environment and simple, robust, high-quality solutions. You will have the opportunity to influence and develop our technical platform at a company that values innovation, collaboration, empathy, and personal development – and we look forward to welcoming you on our continued growth journey.

title: Gameplay Engineer – LLMs, Creator Tools & Narrative Systems
description:
As a Gameplay Engineer on Embark's Machine Learning team, you will help shape the future of storytelling tools and systems for video games.
   

  

 We believe modern AI can unlock entirely new creative workflows for narrative design, quest building, lore creation, and player-facing reactivity. Our goal is to investigate how we can design new tools and systems that enable creators to be more ambitious, collaborate more effectively, and explore ideas with less friction rather than simply automating existing workflows.
   

  

 In this role, you will build gameplay-facing systems, tools, and integrations that make AI useful in real production environments—practical, controllable, debuggable, and aligned with the creative vision. You'll work closely with writers, researchers, designers, and other engineers to explore different levels of AI agency to intentionally design where AI agency makes sense and where it doesn't.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who is excited about creative tooling, loves building things that people actually use, and is genuinely enthusiastic about what new AI techniques can enable in games.
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
* Build gameplay systems and tools that enable new narrative workflows and faster iteration for creators
* Collaborate with designers and narrative teams to understand creative needs and turn them into intuitive tooling
* Develop engine integrations and "hooks" that expose the right information for analysis, validation, and experimentation
* Create debugging and diagnostics workflows that make complex systems understandable and easy to iterate on
* Work with writers and designers to explore and prototype AI-native gameplay mechanics that preserve authorial intent while enabling emergence and reactivity
* Prototype experimental features quickly, then help mature the best ideas into robust production-ready solutions
* Help design and evaluate different degrees of AI autonomy, balancing creative ambition, reliability, and control
* Help ensure AI-assisted workflows remain controllable, transparent, and human-driven
* Work across disciplines to integrate tools into real game development pipelines, not isolated demos


**We would love if you have**
* Strong gameplay engineering experience and excellent C++ skills
* Experience working in Unreal Engine
* A passion for tooling, iteration speed, and developer experience
* A creator mindset: you enjoy building systems that make other people more effective
* Comfort collaborating with designers and translating creative goals into technical solutions
* Professional English communication skills


**Additionally, It's a Bonus If You Have**
* Experience building editor tools or content workflows in Unreal Engine
* Familiarity with language models, AI tooling, evaluation, or "human-in-the-loop" creative systems
* Experience with narrative systems, quest pipelines, or other creator-driven game features
* Python experience, or interest in working across engine + services/tooling


 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 We welcome game makers of all sex, class, colour, age, gender identity, education, religion, opinion, culture, nation of origin, language, sexual orientation, shape, size, and ability.
   

  

 Did we leave anyone out? Well, we welcome you, too! We think that the gaming industry is made better when everyone has a seat at the table.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

title: AI‑utvecklare

 Varm välkommen med din ansökan!

title: iOS Developer
description:
**The Company**
 PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. Creating innovative experiences that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure, PayPal empowers consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the global economy.
   

  

 We operate a global, two-sided network at scale that connects hundreds of millions of merchants and consumers. We help merchants and consumers connect, transact, and complete payments, whether they are online or in person. PayPal is more than a connection to third-party payment networks. We provide proprietary payment solutions accepted by merchants that enable the completion of payments on our platform on behalf of our customers.
   

  

 We offer our customers the flexibility to use their accounts to purchase and receive payments for goods and services, as well as the ability to transfer and withdraw funds. We enable consumers to exchange funds more safely with merchants using a variety of funding sources, which may include a bank account, a PayPal or Venmo account balance, PayPal and Venmo branded credit products, a credit card, a debit card, certain cryptocurrencies, or other stored value products such as gift cards, and eligible credit card rewards. Our PayPal, Venmo, and Xoom products also make it safer and simpler for friends and family to transfer funds to each other. We offer merchants an end-to-end payments solution that provides authorization and settlement capabilities, as well as instant access to funds and payouts. We also help merchants connect with their customers, process exchanges and returns, and manage risk. We enable consumers to engage in cross-border shopping and merchants to extend their global reach while reducing the complexity and friction involved in enabling cross-border trade.
   

  

 Our beliefs are the foundation for how we conduct business every day. We live each day guided by our core values of Inclusion, Innovation, Collaboration, and Wellness. Together, our values ensure that we work together as one global team with our customers at the center of everything we do – and they push us to ensure we take care of ourselves, each other, and our communities.
   

  

**Job Description Summary:**
 We’re building something new in Stockholm, and we want you to be part of it! We are looking for an iOS Developers to join our Business Experience area, a team dedicated to creating seamless and innovative payment experiences for businesses and their customers. Our solutions serve millions of users globally, and now we’re starting fresh in Stockholm to take things to the next level. This is not just another role – it’s an opportunity to help shape a brand-new team from the ground up. You’ll work in a cross-functional, agile environment, delivering small, high-quality increments that make a real impact. We value collaboration, continuous learning, and supporting each other’s growth in ways that suit your journey. As part of this team, you will: Build modern digital products that improve lives and empower businesses worldwide. Solve interesting and complex problems alongside talented peers. Contribute to a culture of innovation and excellence within PayPal globally. If you’re passionate about creating exceptional user experiences and want to be part of something new and exciting, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Essential Responsibilities:**
* Delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (design, implementation, testing, delivery and operations), based on definitions from more senior roles.
* Advises immediate management on project-level issues
* Guides junior engineers
* Operates with little day-to-day supervision, making technical decisions based on knowledge of internal conventions and industry best practices
* Applies knowledge of technical best practices in making decisions


**Expected Qualifications:**
* 3+ years relevant experience and a Bachelor’s degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience.


**Additional Responsibilities And Preferred Qualifications**
* Good experience in iOS development, with good knowledge of Swift.
* Familiarity with iOS SDK, SwiftUI and various Apple's frameworks and understand how to leverage them effectively to build robust iOS applications.
* Understanding of common architectural patterns such as MVVM (Model-View-ViewModel).
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and automation tools like Jenkins or Fastlane to streamline the build, test, and deployment process.
* Commitment to writing clean, maintainable code with a focus on code quality and experience with unit testing, integration testing, and UI testing.
* Keen interest in keeping up to date with the latest technological development.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.


 PayPal does not charge candidates any fees for courses, applications, resume reviews, interviews, background checks, or onboarding. Any such request is a red flag and likely part of a scam. To learn more about how to identify and avoid recruitment fraud please visit https://careers.pypl.com/contact-us.
   

  

 For the majority of employees, PayPal's balanced hybrid work model offers 3 days in the office for effective in-person collaboration and 2 days at your choice of either the PayPal office or your home workspace, ensuring that you equally have the benefits and conveniences of both locations.
   

  

**Our Benefits:**
 At PayPal, we’re committed to building an equitable and inclusive global economy. And we can’t do this without our most important asset-you. That’s why we offer benefits to help you thrive in every stage of life. We champion your financial, physical, and mental health by offering valuable benefits and resources to help you care for the whole you.
   

  

 We have great benefits including a flexible work environment, employee shares options, health and life insurance and more. To learn more about our benefits please visit https://www.paypalbenefits.com
   

  

**Who We Are:**
 To learn more about our culture and community visit https://about.pypl.com/who-we-are/default.aspx
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 PayPal provides equal employment opportunity (EEO) to all persons regardless of age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law. In addition, PayPal will provide reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities. If you are unable to submit an application because of incompatible assistive technology or a disability, please contact us at paypalglobaltalentacquisition@paypal.com.
   

  

**Belonging at PayPal:**
 Our employees are central to advancing our mission, and we strive to create an environment where everyone can do their best work with a sense of purpose and belonging. Belonging at PayPal means creating a workplace with a sense of acceptance and security where all employees feel included and valued. We are proud to have a diverse workforce reflective of the merchants, consumers, and communities that we serve, and we continue to take tangible actions to cultivate inclusivity and belonging at PayPal.
   

  

 Any general requests for consideration of your skills, please Join our Talent Community.
   

  

 We know the confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting spectacular candidates. Please don’t hesitate to apply.
   

  

 REQ ID R0131984

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Join our highly skilled team of developers, breaking new ground and shaping the future of retail.** 




  





**We dare to dream big, we have the courage to keep raising the bar, and we’re committed to being a force for good in retail - helping both established and fast-growing brands meet the ever-changing expectations of their customers.** 




  





**Sitoo is a fast-growing technology company exploring how far we can take innovation to deliver the world’s best Unified Commerce Platform and Point of Sale. Our technology is used in more than 20 countries - a number that keeps growing thanks to our incredible team of engineers. And we have no intention of slowing down. Are you the Senior Software Engineer we’re looking for?** 




  





**Your mission at Sitoo** 




  





 Be part of a small, agile team that designs, builds, and owns products from concept to launch. You’ll collaborate to solve real customer problems using smart technology choices. If you know your way around AWS, Node.js, and TypeScript, you’ll fit right in.
 



  





**What you'll do** 




  




* Design and build cloud‑native services on AWS
* Create self‑service capabilities for customers and internal users
* Implement secure identity and access management
* Own services across the full lifecycle with your team
* Participate in on‑call rotation



  





**What you’ll bring to the table** 




  




* Product mindset with ownership across the service lifecycle
* Experience building scalable, reliable cloud services
* Understanding of serverless and container-based concepts and patterns
* Collaborative mindset who shares knowledge
* Clear communication and high agency



  





**Why Sitoo** 




  





 We are forward thinkers. By turning curiosity into knowledge, and knowledge into continuous improvement, we break new ground and shape the future of retail.
 



  





 We believe in an inclusive culture where everyone feels like they belong. We support each other, win together, celebrate success together, and overcome challenges together.
 



  





 Today, we are close to 120 dedicated experts with a positive and solution-oriented mindset. Most importantly, we take care of each other, and we never forget to have fun.

title: Backend platform developer
description:
**About us** 




 Hacksaw Studios is a Stockholm-based game studio focused on creating innovative, high-quality gaming experiences. With a focus on performance and precision, we bring ideas to life through technical expertise and creative collaboration. We have wide distribution, and our games are played by millions of people every month by players all over the world.
 



  





 We are now looking for a C# platform developer to join our growing Stockholm team. You'll be the person helping build and maintain the high-performance backend systems that power our games and platform infrastructure. You'll be solving real technical challenges that impact thousands of active users, collaborating closely with product teams, and helping ensure our platform is robust and ready for future growth.
 



  





**The Role** 




 Your key responsibilities include:
 


* Design & Implement Features: Build robust, scalable features for our C# / ASP.NET-based platform and supporting systems.
* Optimize Performance: Ensure code and data structures deliver high throughput, low latency, and reliable processing of thousands of transactions per second.
* Testing & Stability: Write and maintain comprehensive unit tests to ensure platform stability.
* Code Collaboration: Participate in code reviews and contribute to clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.
* Technical Documentation: Maintain clear and thorough technical documentation.
* Team Coordination: Work closely with peers and product teams to maintain architectural consistency and meet performance standards.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* Strong experience in C# backend development.
* Solid understanding of ASP.NET (experience preferred but can be developed on the job).
* Deep knowledge of SQL, including writing efficient queries and designing high-performance database schemas.
* Practical experience with caching strategies (e.g., Redis).
* Expertise in multithreaded programming and thread-safe design patterns.
* Proficiency in using the C# debugger for troubleshooting complex issues.
* A mindset focused on performance, scalability, and reliability.



  





**Nice-to-have:** 



* Experience with automated unit testing frameworks.
* A university degree in Computer Science or related field.
* Interest in gaming, professionally or recreationally.
* Experience with front-end development.
* Experience mentoring or coaching other colleagues.



  





**What We Offer** 



* A modern office in central Stockholm.
* Work with experienced, passionate colleagues in the gaming industry.
* The opportunity to create games with a global audience.
* Real influence, ownership, and personal growth opportunities.
* Wellbeing perks including wellness allowance and regular in-office massage.



  





**Practical Details** 



* This is an on-site position in Stockholm.
* Unfortunately, we cannot assist with relocation or visa sponsorship.



  





 If you would like more information or have questions about the position, you are welcome to contact our recruitment consultant Henrik Dellgren or Elin Lidström at Novare, email: henrik.dellgren@novare.se / elin.lidstrom@novare.se
 



  





**Ready to Join the Game Makers?** 




 Apply now! We review applications on a rolling basis.

title: Game Client Framework Developer
description:
**About Us**
 Hacksaw Studios is a Stockholm-based game studio focused on creating innovative, high-quality gaming experiences. With a focus on performance and precision, we bring ideas to life through technical expertise and creative collaboration. We have wide distribution, and our games are played by millions of people every month by players all over the world.
   

  

 We’re now expanding our tech team and looking for skilled Framework Developers who want to help us build and refine the foundation that powers our games.
   

  

 The Role
   

  

 As a Framework Developer at Hacksaw Studios, you’ll work together with our game development teams to deliver the features and tools they rely on. The work includes both building new functionality and maintaining, refining and optimising existing code. You'll think holistically about each feature you implement, how it impacts long term developer productivity, usability and performance across memory, GPU and CPU.
   

  

 The framework team is also responsible for areas such as CI pipelines, end-to-end tests and build scripts (including asset optimization and more). Depending on your interests and skillset there is a wide range of technologies you can dive into. We keep meetings to a minimum and there is a lot of freedom and responsibility in prioritising tasks and defining scopes, perfect for someone who communicates well, enjoys finding the right solution and likes having focused time to get things done.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities Include**
* Develop and maintain features, tools, and systems used by our game teams.
* Improve performance, usability, and reliability across our framework.
* Considering long-term implications of implmentations, including developer experience, usability and performance.
* Collaborate with developers and designers to identify and solve technical challenges.
* Participate in reviews and provide feedback on code and implementation.


**What We’re Looking For**
* Experience with one or more programming languages suited for game development, such as C#, C++, TypeScript or Haxe.
* Experience with different game development frameworks with some understanding of their structure and how to handle rendering. Ideally with games targeting web.
* A proactive mindset with strong communication skills and a sense of ownership.


**Nice-to-have**
* Experience developing modules used by other developers.
* Interest in performance optimization.
* Our tech stack includes git, TypeScript, Linux, bash, Bun, Docker, Cucumber, GitLab and AWS. Familiarity with any of those tools are beneficial but not required.
* A personal interest in games and an understanding of the gaming industry.


 What We Offer
   

  

* A modern office in central Stockholm.
* Work with experienced, passionate colleagues in the gaming industry.
* The opportunity to create games with a global audience.
* Real influence, ownership, and personal growth opportunities.
* Wellbeing perks including wellness allowance and regular in-office massage.


 Practical Details
   

  

* Unfortunately, we cannot assist with relocation or visa sponsorship.


 Ready to Join the Game Makers?
   

  

 Apply now! We review applications on a rolling basis.

title: Experienced NetSuite Developer
description:

 **NetSuite Developer** 
 who is not only comfortable with SuiteScript and system integrations but is excited to shape how we use technology to scale.
   

  

 You’ll join a fast-growing company with a clear purpose, working at the heart of our operations, and collaborating closely with Finance, Operations, and IT. This is a hands-on role where your expertise will directly influence how we automate, streamline, and grow.
   

  

****What You’ll Do:****
 As a
 **NetSuite Developer** 
 , you will play a key role in developing and configuring NetSuite solutions that support Aimo’s business functions. You’ll contribute to customizing and optimizing the system to ensure it aligns with Aimo’s unique needs and objectives.
   

  

* Develop and configure NetSuite ERP to support various business functions, with a strong focus on finance, accounting, and reporting.
* Take full ownership of NetSuite’s setup, continuously improving workflows, automation, and processes to drive business efficiency.

 **NetSuite Developer** 
 with a deep understanding of ERP systems and a strong passion for automating and optimizing business processes. You thrive in a fast-paced environment and are eager to take ownership of a complex system to drive measurable business outcomes.

 Aimo is owned by Sumitomo Corporation – a global investment company and member of the Sumitomo Group.  Stockholm (Hybrid)
   

  

 📅
