title: Summer 2026 Seasonal Tour Guide Stockholm & Uppsala
description:
**About XperienceSthlm** 





 XperienceSthlm is a premier cultural tourism company based in Stockholm, Sweden. Founded in 2023, we specialize in creating immersive experiences that connect visitors and residents with Uppsala’s and Stockholm's rich history, culture, and hidden gems. Our diverse team of local experts offers a wide range of tours including historical walking tours, architecture exploration, nature excursions, thrifting experiences, and cultural exchange programs. We pride ourselves on our international team, women-led leadership, inclusive work environment, and our commitment to providing authentic, personalized experiences that go beyond typical tourist attractions.
 




  





**Position: Seasonal Tour Guide** 





 We're seeking enthusiastic and knowledgeable seasonal tour guides to join our team for the summer season (June - September 2026). This is a fantastic opportunity to share your passion for Stockholm and Sweden with visitors from around the world while being part of a dynamic, international team.
 




  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Lead engaging and informative tours across Stockholm's & Uppsala’s most interesting neighborhoods and attractions
* Provide historical context, cultural insights, and local knowledge during tours
* Ensure customer satisfaction and create memorable experiences for all participants
* Manage group dynamics and maintain a positive atmosphere throughout tours
* Handle logistics and safety considerations during outdoor excursions
* Build relationships with customers and encourage repeat bookings
* Maintain tour materials and ensure accurate information delivery



  





**Requirements:** 




**Essential Requirements:** 



* Legal right to work in Sweden
* Swedish personnummer (personal identity number)
* Ideally already registered as self-employed with Skatteverket
* Able to work the whole Summer 2026 season (no holidays)



  





**Personality & Character Traits (Mandatory):** 



* Sociable, open-minded, and friendly personality with excellent interpersonal skills
* Coachable and able to implement feedback effectively
* Outgoing and curious nature with a genuine interest in learning and discovery
* Strong interest in languages, travel, or other cultures
* Ability to engage with diverse audiences and create welcoming experiences



  





**Preferred Certifications:** 

 Degree (complete or in progress) in any of the following fields:
 



* Art History
* Swedish or Nordic History
* Geology
* Ethnography
* Architecture
* AfroSwedish History
* Viking History and Mythology



  





**Language Requirements:** 



* Fluent in English
* Fluency in at least one additional language: Swedish, German, Spanish, or French



  





**What We Offer:** 




**Compensation (as a freelancer):** 



* 200 SEK per hour + VAT
* 300 SEK per hour + VAT on public holidays ("red days")
* 10% commission bonus on every additional tour booked by repeat customers through you



  





**Schedule:** 



* Seasonal work from June 1st to September 30th, 2026
* Flexible hours based on tour demand and availability
* Opportunity for both scheduled tours and private bookings
* Days off are interwoven with working days (always a max. of 2 days off in a 10-day period)



  





**Professional Environment:** 



* Supportive, international team with diverse backgrounds
* Access to ongoing training and development opportunities
* Opportunity to build your professional network and work experience in Sweden
* Work with a company that values diversity, inclusivity, and cultural exchange



  





**Equal Opportunity Statement:** 

 We encourage everyone to apply! If you require certain accommodations during the application or interview process, please contact us at hej@xperiencesthlm.com and we'll be happy to adjust accordingly.
 




  





**Ideal Candidate Profile:** 

 You're passionate about Stockholm/Uppsala and Swedish culture, with excellent communication skills and the ability to engage diverse audiences. You're comfortable working independently, have strong organizational skills, and take pride in delivering exceptional customer experiences. Whether you're a history buff, architecture enthusiast, or simply love sharing your knowledge of this amazing city, we want to hear from you!
 




  





**How to Apply:** 

 To apply for this exciting opportunity, please send your CV and a brief cover letter highlighting your relevant experience and qualifications to:
 
 hej@xperiencesthlm.com
 



  






 We have about 4 seasonal positions to fill. Our recruitment process usually takes 1 to 2 weeks max, and we always reply to applicants, even if they don’t make it to the interview round. After the interview round, our CEO @Francisca Leonardo will make the final decision on who will be hired.
 




  






 Join us this summer and help create unforgettable experiences for visitors discovering the wonders of Stockholm!

title: Senior Aviation Platform Engineer
description:
**Flightradar24 is one of the most successful growth-stage tech companies in Stockholm. Each month more than 50 million aviation enthusiasts visit Flightradar24 (app/website) and our Commercial services team has many of the biggest names in aviation on its customer list.**
**We are looking for a Senior Aviation Platform Engineer, who can quickly understand existing systems, work independently, and deliver value from day one. You will play a key role in evolving our aviation data and improving flight matching algorithms, working closely with other engineers and stakeholders. You will be part of a platform engineering team responsible for designing, building, and operating scalable data solutions in AWS. The work includes both hands-on development and architectural decision-making.**
**The position requires that you are able to work in Stockholm, Sweden. Relocation is not offered for this role.**
**What You’ll Do**
**Your responsibilities include**
* Real-time aircraft telemetry
* Global receiver networks (ADS-B, Mode-S, MLAT)
* Noisy radio data
* Flight trajectory processing and reconstruction
* Aviation data pipelines
* Geo-spatial computation
* Airspace analytics
* Aircraft state vectors
* Large-scale historical flight datasets
* Work with data that powers aviation insights
+ access to the largest open aircraft surveillance dataset in the world
+ systems used by millions of aviation enthusiasts every month
+ data that contributes to accident investigations and aviation safety


**Who You Are**
* Has several years of hands-on experience building and operating production systems
* Is self-driven and comfortable making technical decisions independently
* Can quickly understand and work within an existing codebase and architecture
* Values clean code, testing, automation, and pragmatic engineering practices
* Communicates clearly and professionally in English


**About Flightradar24**
**Flightradar24 is the leading flight tracking and aviation data provider, leveraging the world’s largest ADS-B network. Our B2C platform serves millions, while our B2B solutions empower airlines, airports, and aviation stakeholders with essential operational insights.**
**All this is made possible thanks to our globally distributed network of 55,000+ radio receivers that feed real-time aircraft data into the Flightradar24 platform. Over a billion database entries are added each month and we are processing several years of historical data totalling many terabytes. Our proprietary flight tracking data is industry leading and even investigative government agencies from around the world rely on it for aviation accident investigations.**
**Benefits of working at Flightradar24 include:**
* Opportunity to impact a service with millions of end users from all around the world
* Contribute to the value which Flightradar24 creates both for B2C and B2B but also for humanity.
* Modern office in the heart of beautiful downtown Stockholm, Sweden
* Being part of a diverse team
* Flexible and social work environment with free beverages, fruit, and snacks


 Flightradar24 started as a hobby project in 2006 when two Swedish aviation geeks decided to build a network of ADS-B receivers in Northern and Central Europe. In 2009 we opened up the network, and made it possible for anyone with an ADS-B receiver to upload data to the network. Many parts of the world were quickly covered, but the quest to provide global ADS-B coverage is still ongoing.
   

  

**Flightradar24 at a glance**
* Largest ADS-B network in the world with over 55,000 connected receivers
* 5+ million users per day
* 100+ million app downloads

title: Fintech Co-Founder / CCO (100 % remote) (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking to hire ambitious entrepreneurs to start and scale their own startups.
 


  


 We are serial entrepreneurs, for example Paul Müller (founder Adjust, €1.2B exit) and Petter Made (founder SumUp, €8B) who are eager to support outlier personalities and serial entrepreneurs to build €1B+ companies.
 


  


 Our offer:
 


  

  
* A salary while you build your startup as you will directly be employed by us. Alternatively, you can opt for up to
 **€500k** 
 in funding.
  
* **1:1 sparring with unicorn founders** 
 on a weekly basis
  
* **Community** 
 : Access to the top 0.1% of founders, peers and investors
  
* **Team building** 
 : Hiring top notch talent supported through our network (over 50,000 professionals)
  
* **Distribution** 
 : Support in reaching product-market-fit and building up a sales force / marketing machine
  
* **Funding support** 
 for securing a multi-million euro funding round within 12 months (on average, EWOR Fellows raise > €2M after our Grand Pitch)
  


  


 One of our fellows set a record for Europe’s largest pre-seed round by a first-time founder, securing a €12M pre-seed investment.
 


  

 Tasks
   

  
* You will own, build, and run your startup in fields such as Fintech
  
* You will embark on an extensive personal development journey crafted by unicorn founders and follow a fully customised programme enhancing your goal, time, and energy management
  
* You will receive support in hiring through our network to over 50,000 professionals and advice as well as best practices from serial entrepreneurs
  
* You will receive intensive coaching to make your startup ready to raise millions in funding
  
* You will iterate your product with us until having reached product-market-fit and receive support in building up a sales force or creating a marketing engine respectively
  


  

 Requirements
   

  
* You are based in Europe or the Americas or open to relocate
  
* You are willing to take full responsibility for your own startup and scale it to €100M+ in revenues
  
* You have excellent communication skills in the English language
  


  


 Join us and build a €1B+ company with us!

title: Senior Product Owner
description:
**We are looking for a senior Product Owner for a company in Södertälje. Start is in April, 24-month contract to begin with.** 




 The Product Owner drives the development of Digital Dealer, ensuring the solution is user centric, business aligned, and data driven. The role focuses on maximizing product value through clear prioritization, agile delivery, and close collaboration with key stakeholders.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 • Own and prioritize the product backlog and maintain a transparent roadmap.
 



 • Lead iterative and agile product development.
 



 • Ensure the product supports efficient workshop and dealer processes.
 



 • Collaborate with stakeholders and align priorities across functions.
 



 • Integrate AI, analytics, and data driven insights into the product.
 



 • Track performance through defined OKRs and KPIs.
 



 • Ensure compliance with strategic, security, and governance frameworks.
 



  





**Required Skills** 




 • Strong analytical and structured problem solving skills.
 



 • Experience in agile delivery and iterative development.
 



 • Understanding of AI, data analytics, and digital ecosystems.
 



 • Strong communication and stakeholder management ability.
 



 • Ability to define and monitor OKRs/KPIs.
 



  





**Experience Requirements** 




 • Minimum 1 year of experience as a Product Owner or equivalent.
 



 • Experience with digitalization of workshop or service processes.
 



 • Experience with UX, data, AI, or cloud is beneficial.
 



  





**Stakeholders** 




 Key interfaces include commercial functions, regional organizations, business units, D365 program teams, IT functions, R&D, and service related departments.
 



  





**This role requires fluency in Swedish and English, both written and spoken.** 




  





 This is a full-time consultant position in Södertälje through Incluso. Start is in April, 24-month
 
 limited contract to begin with, with possibility of extension after that. This role is 50% onsite in Södertälje.
 



  





 Please submit your CV as soon as possible since we will review the applications on an on-going basis.
 



  





 For more information about this role, please contact Kanika Singhal
 
 recruiter at Incluso.

title: Software Sales Lead - Nordics
description:
Are you looking to join a global market-leading company that is shaping the future of Energy Management and Automation?
   

  

 Schneider Electric is at the forefront of driving innovative and sustainable technologies across homes, buildings, data centers, infrastructure, and industries. We believe in the power of great people and are committed to driving innovation, diversity, and sustainability. Globally we are more than 150,000 people in 100+ countries and among the most sustainable companies in the world.
   

  

 As a Software Sales Lead in the Nordics, you will drive the growth of Schneider Electric’s software business across the Nordic Data Center market. You will play a key role in expanding our footprint in one of Europe’s most dynamic regions for digital infrastructure—working closely with Secure Power sales teams, segment leaders, partners, and end‑users to position, demonstrate, and sell our Software solutions.
   

  

 This is a unique opportunity to join a rapidly growing business within a thriving market, supported by a strong, experienced team including Pre‑Sales specialists, Marketing, Category Management, and Customer Success.
   

  

 The position can be based in any of our offices in Sweden.
   

  

**What you'll be doing:** 
  

  

* Take ownership for growing the Software business within the Nordics, and achieving commercial targets
* Identify, qualify, and prioritize business opportunities across the region
* Develop strong relationships with key decision‑makers in targeted accounts
* Build close collaboration with country sales leadership and Secure Power teams
* Develop and execute a local go‑to‑market strategy in alignment with the Europe Sales Director
* Consult with customers to shape opportunities and maximize value creation
* Lead major project pursuits from presales through proposal and execution
* Coordinate internal and external stakeholders to drive successful outcomes
* Detect and articulate customer pain points and propose high‑value software solutions
* Represent Schneider Electric across a complex ecosystem of partners, influencers, and co‑competitors


**What will help you succeed:** 
  

  

* 2+ years of sales or commercial experience (direct or indirect)
* Understanding of account management, partner channels, and customer engagement models
* Experience discussing technical and business challenges with customers
* Knowledge of software, IT, electrical distribution, critical power, building automation, or data center ecosystems
* Ability to navigate complex matrix organizations in a multicultural environment
* Strong initiative, self‑starter mindset, and excellent organizational ability
* Strong influencing, communication, and interpersonal skills
* Tenacity, resilience, and emotional intelligence
* Preferably a degree in a Science or Business‑related field
* BS/BA or MBA is advantageous
* Fluency in English; an additional Nordic language is an advantage
* Travel may be required within the Nordics region
* Comfortable pitching, presenting, demonstrating, and closing business both remotely and in person


**Why Schneider Electric?** 
  

  

 At Schneider Electric, we are committed to fostering a vibrant and inclusive work culture where every employee is empowered to thrive. As part of our team, you can expect:
   

  

* Professional Growth: Access to continuous learning opportunities, mentorship programs, and career development resources to nurture your potential and drive your career forward.
* Innovative Environment: Be part of a dynamic, forward-thinking organization that encourages creativity, innovation, and entrepreneurial spirit as we lead the way in digital transformation and sustainability.
* Work-Life Balance: We value your well-being and offer flexible work arrangements and support to help you maintain a healthy work-life balance.
* Global Impact: Contribute to meaningful projects that address global energy challenges and sustainability, making a positive impact on the world while advancing your career.
* Inclusive Community: Join a diverse and inclusive community where your unique perspectives are celebrated, and your voice is heard, fostering an environment of collaboration and belonging.


**Did we get you inspired?**
 Apply now to embark on an exciting career journey with us!
   

  

 Submit your application today as we will fill the position as soon as a suitable candidate is found.
   

  

**Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**
 When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.
   

  

 IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.
   

  

 We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.
   

  

 Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!
   

  

 €36 billion global revenue
   

  

 +13% organic growth
   

  

 150 000+ employees in 100+ countries
   

  

 #1 on the Global 100 World’s most sustainable corporations
   

  

 You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled.
   

  

*Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*
*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter here*
*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

title: Head of Finance - Sweden (Teira)
description:
Teira söker en
 **Country Head of Finance** 
 som vill ta ett helhetsansvar för landets finansfunktion och vara en nära affärspartner till den lokala ledningen. Rollen rapporterar direkt till Group Finance Director och bedrivs i nära samarbete med Group Finance.
   

  

 Som Country Head of Finance har du en central roll i att säkerställa finansiell stabilitet, hög kvalitet i rapportering och efterlevnad av gällande regelverk, samtidigt som du bidrar till affärsutveckling och långsiktigt värdeskapande. Rollen kombinerar strategiskt perspektiv med operativt ledarskap och passar dig som trivs i gränslandet mellan siffror, människor och affär.
   

  

**Ansvar och uppdrag**
 I rollen ansvarar du för den finansiella uppföljningen på landsnivå och fungerar som finansiell sparringpartner till Country Leadership Team. Du följer upp resultat mot budget och strategi, driver budget- och prognosarbete samt bidrar med analys och beslutsunderlag för att stödja verksamhetens mål.
   

  

 Ditt ansvar omfattar även att säkerställa att landets juridiska enheter uppfyller finansiella och regulatoriska krav. Du arbetar nära både kommersiella och operativa funktioner för att identifiera risker och möjligheter samt säkerställa korrekt och transparent rapportering, särskilt kopplat till projektverksamhet.
   

  

 En viktig del av rollen är att bidra till god finansiell styrning. Det innebär bland annat att arbeta med interna kontroller, riskhantering och skattefrågor, samt att vara kontaktpunkt gentemot externa parter såsom revisorer, banker och myndigheter, i samverkan med Group Finance.
   

  

**Dina kvalifikationer och erfarenhet**
* Flerårig erfarenhet från en senior finansiell ledarroll (t.ex. Head of Finance, Finance Director eller CFO).
* Erfarenhet från industri-, bygg-, energi- eller närliggande branscher är meriterande.
* Erfarenhet av arbete i Private Equity-ägda bolag är en fördel.
* Erfarenhet av M&A, bankrelationer och kassaflödesstyrning är meriterande.
* Stark ledarskapsförmåga och vana att arbeta i komplexa organisationer.
* Mycket god kommunikativ förmåga och förmåga att omsätta finansiell information till affärsinsikter.
* Akademisk examen inom ekonomi, redovisning eller motsvarande (MBA eller annan vidareutbildning är meriterande).
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift; ytterligare språk är meriterande.


**Väckte vi ditt intresse?**
 Sök gärna tjänsten så snart som möjligt, men senast den 22.3.2026. Tjänsten tillsätts så snart vi har hittat rätt kandidat. För mer information om tjänsten, vänligen kontakta Josefina Xanthou, CFO Teira, +46 704196712 eller Dina Rystedt, CHRO Teira, +46 702576728.
   

  

***På Teira moderniserar vi inte bara byggnader, vi förändrar hur människor upplever dem. Med omkring 530 engagerade kollegor på 40 platser runt om i Norden delar vi ett gemensamt uppdrag: att göra de byggnader som uppfördes före dagens hållbarhetsstandarder, redo för framtiden.***

title: TECHNO FUNCTIONAL CONSULTANT L2
description:

 Experience: 8-10 Years
   

 .
 



  
 



 Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end-to-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. title: Customer Engineer Thermal
description:
**Job Summary**
**JOB DESCRIPTION**
 Vertiv are hiring for an Customer Engineer with a background in Thermal management products in Sweden. The role will be based out of our Stockholm office and require regular travel to client sites. A lot of the work is close to Stockholm but candidates must be willing and able to travel to sites across all of Sweden and Nordics wide.
   

  

 Responsible for commissioning, maintenance, component replacements and emergency repairs of Vertiv’s Thermal Management products as well as other contracted systems. Another important task is to provide good technical support to customers and internally. Required to establish, promote and maintain excellent relations with all customers, sales managers, distributors and others within the field. Maintain ongoing communication with scheduling teams and department Management.
   

  

 As Vertiv face to face representative on site, your objective is to promote Vertiv as a professional service provider.
   

  

**Duties & Responsibilities**
* Respond in a professional manner to all assigned service calls while on duty.
* Perform all work in a safe manner and in accordance with established company safety policy.
* Perform all work using good working practice and current codes of practice/legislation relevant to assigned task.
* Assist in ensuring that the planned maintenance completion rate is maintained at a min 90%.
* Assist back office to schedule, plan and close any works as required, using established work flow procedures.
* Keep scheduling team informed of changes to your schedule and the status of all open jobs.
* Submit daily paperwork in a timely, accurate and complete manner and in case of Wireless Field Service ensure the job is debriefed in a complete and accurate manner at the customer’s premises where possible
* Report sales or service leads to the proper department.
* Support company vision and management decisions.
* Ensure that all ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 agreed processes are followed
* Ensure that all Vertiv processes are followed.
* Keep company vehicle clean and properly maintained.
* Protect all tooling and company property issued and keep calibrated as requested
* Work as part of the service team and support business needs.
* Provide a positive influence to peers
* Provide on site technical assistance with difficult problems
* Work closely & assist department managers, salesman, contracts engineer & managers with their day-to day operational duties.
* Attend customer meetings as required
* The employee ensure that any activity, task and responsibility required by role in terms of [Export Compliance], [Import Compliance], [EU Arrivals and Despatching], as well as [Supply Chain Security] is managed and performed in full compliance with the Company International Trade Compliance Regulation certification program itself


**Qualifications**
 Preferable 5 years experience of working in a technical service environment with Thermal equipment or similar but the right personality is equally important.
   

  

* Having Swedish “kylcertifikat Kategori I”.
* Computer skills including all Microsoft Office associated programs such as, Word, Excel, Outlook
* Previous environmental service experience
* Excellent customer service skills
* Strong communication skills
* Self-starter, ability to plan, organise and manage time effectively with ability to work under pressure.
* Clean valid driving licence.


**WORKING CONDITIONS**
* Travel on a daily basis to and from customer sites
* Will be required to stay away from home and travel within Sweden, Nordics or Europe to support projects when needed.
* Participate on the 24/7 call out rota
* After-hours and weekend work, scheduled with little notice may happen.
* Occasional heavy lifting required
* You will be expected to operate as part of a team
* Company uniform supplied, which must be worn whilst working.


**Benefits**
* Competitive Base Salary
* Company Car and Fuel Card
* 25 vacation days, plus 10 bridge days
* Annual wellness allowance worth 4200 SEK
* Doctors expenses claim back worth 1300 SEK
* Gym in office
* Subsidized lunches
* Flexible work options when not on client site
* Expenses
* Daily allowances
* Overtime and On Call pay


**The above duties and responsibilities are intended to describe the general nature and requirements of the position, and are not intended to be an exhaustive list. In order to achieve business objectives, other duties may be included at the discretion of the department manager.**
**OUR CORE PRINCIPALS** 
 : Safety. Integrity. Respect. Teamwork. Diversity & Inclusion.
   

  

**OUR STRATEGIC PRIORITIES**
* Customer Focus
* Operational Excellence
* High-Performance Culture
* Innovation
* Financial Strength


**OUR BEHAVIORS**
* Own It
* Act With Urgency
* Foster a Customer-First Mindset
* Think Big and Execute
* Lead by Example
* Drive Continuous Improvement
* Learn and Seek Out Development
* Promote Transparent & Open Communication


 Vertiv is an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action employer. We promote equal opportunities for all with respect to hiring, terms of employment, mobility, training, compensation, and occupational health, without discrimination as to age, race, color, religion, creed, sex, pregnancy status (including childbirth, breastfeeding, or related medical conditions), marital status, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression (including transgender status or sexual stereotypes), genetic information, citizenship status, national origin, protected veteran status, political affiliation, or disability. If you have a disability and are having difficulty accessing or using this website to apply for a position, you can request help by sending an email If you are interested in applying or learning more about this role, please visit the company's career page located on Vertiv.com/Careers.

title: Power Platform Management Consultant | Modern Workplace
description:
Unlock the potential of Power Platform as a visionary engineer, transforming challenges into cutting-edge solutions. Embrace continuous learning and collaborate with global teams to shape the future of technology-driven excellence. Join us at Avanade, where creativity, innovation, and career growth thrive.
   

  

 Are you a visionary Power Platform Engineer with a track record of designing and implementing cutting-edge solutions? You thrive on transforming business challenges into powerful automated solutions, and your attention to detail sets you apart. Embrace your passion for continuous learning and seize the opportunity to deliver top-tier results under pressure. Join us as we shape the future with technology-driven excellence!
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 As a Power Platform Management Consultant, your focus is on Power Platform solutions within the Workplace services field. Day to day you will design and implement Power Platform applications to meet client requirements. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams under challenging circumstances to deliver high-quality solutions. You will apply your expertise in the Power Platform and Microsoft 365 suite of products translating business requirements into technical deliverables, estimating and managing timing, workforce and demand supply process, and addressing task backlog as well as unit testing phasis for continuous improvement of client solutions. You will share best practices for Power Platform solutions with global Avanade team members and attend partner events for knowledge and delivery model sharing.
   

  

**You Have Previous And Solid Experience With**
* Designing and developing Power Automate flows.
* Applying strong business analysis methodology and requirements-gathering skills.
* Implementing agile development practices.
* Showing a critical thinking problem-solving and troubleshooting skills approach.
* Creating, analyzing, and visualizing data with Power BI.
* Using Dataverse with Power Platform solutions.
* Securing apps and data with the latest and most robust techniques.


**Qualifications**
 You’re a natural communicator who wants to help our partners on their Power Platform implementation journey. You will help improve employee mobility, efficiency, teamwork, and security demonstrating your experience in Microsoft 365 suite. Your interpersonal and communication skills help technical and non-technical clients engage with often complex information.
   

  

**Characteristics That Can Spell Success For This Role Are**
* Embrace challenges with a keen intellect and a thirst for knowledge.
* Collaborate seamlessly, fostering open and effective communication.
* Embrace creativity and explore groundbreaking solutions.
* Stay ahead of the curve, anticipating what lies ahead and adapting to the latest advancements.


**Some Of The Best Things About Working At Avanade**
* Opportunity to work for Microsoft’s Global Alliance Partner of the Year (14 years)


 As you bring your skills and abilities to Avanade, you’ll get distinctive experiences, limitless learning, and ambitious growth in return. As we continue to build our diverse and inclusive culture, we become even more innovative and creative, helping us better serve our clients and communities. You’ll join a community of smart, supportive collaborators to lift, mentor, and guide you, and to lean on your expertise. You get a company purpose-built for business-critical, leading-edge technology solutions, committed to improving the way humans work, interact, and live. It’s all here, so take a closer look!
   

  

**Together We Do What Matters.**
 We work hard to provide an inclusive, diverse culture with a deep sense of belonging for all our employees. Visit our Inclusion & Diversity page.
   

  

 Create a future for our people that focuses on
   

  

* Expanding your thinking
* Experimenting courageously
* Learning and pivoting


 Inspire greatness in our people by
   

  

* Empowering every voice
* Encouraging boldness
* Celebrating progress


 Accelerate the impact of our people by
   

  

* Amazing the client
* Prioritizing what matters
* Acting as one

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
description:
*Implema är ett IT-konsultbolag med närmare 300 medarbetare och en stark framdrift som genomsyrar hela organisationen. Vår vardag präglas av samarbete, mod och en vilja att hela tiden vilja göra saker lite bättre varje dag. Vi gillar att ha kul på vägen och tror att nyfikenhet och engagemang är avgörande för både personlig och organisatorisk utveckling.*
 Nu söker vi en erfaren TA Specialist som vill ta över stafettpinnen och driva vårt TA-arbete vidare under tiden vår kollega är på föräldraledighet. Vikariatet startar i maj 2026 och löper cirka ett år, med goda möjligheter till förlängning. Du ingår i vårt People-team tillsammans med ytterligare fyra kollegor. Vi arbetar nära varandra och agerar löpande bollplank i både operativa och strategiska frågor.
   

  

**Om rollen** 
  

  

 Som TA Specialist hos oss blir du en central del av både vårt People-team och samarbetar nära våra rekryterande chefer. Du ansvarar på egen hand för TA-arbetet och rollen präglas av högt tempo, tydliga mål och ett nära samarbeten internt.
   

  

 Vi befinner oss i en stark tillväxtfas, vilket innebär att rekrytering är en affärskritisk del av vår fortsatta resa. Du får en nyckelroll i att attrahera och engagera rätt talanger inom vår nisch av affärssystemkonsulter.
   

  

**Exempel på ansvarsområden:**
* Driva hela rekryteringsprocessen: annonsering, search, urval och intervjuer
* Bygga och utveckla vårt kandidatnätverk
* Arbeta aktivt med employer branding-aktiviteter och kandidatkommunikation
* Delta på och koordinera rekryteringsmässor och event
* Analysera och följa upp rekryteringsdata
* Bidra till att utveckla och effektivisera våra interna TA-processer


 Du har även huvudansvar för att driva rekryteringen till Implemas Traineeprogram med planerad start under hösten.
   

  

 Det här är en roll med många kontaktytor, stort eget ansvar och goda möjligheter att påverka hur vi arbetar med Talent Acquisition framåt.
   

  

**Är du vår nya kollega?** 
  

  

 Vi tror att du är en självgående och strukturerad person som trivs i en roll med högt tempo och stort eget ansvar. Du är van att driva processer framåt, hålla flera parallella rekryteringar igång och samtidigt säkerställa kvalitet i varje steg. Vi söker dig som trivs med att proaktivt bygga och vårda ett starkt kandidatnätverk och som förstår hur man genom smart och kreativ användning av sociala medier och digitala kanaler bygger ett modernt employer brand som attraherar rätt tech‑talanger.
   

  

 Du är trygg i dialogen med chefer och vågar ta en rådgivande roll där du bidrar med perspektiv, utmanar när det behövs och hjälper organisationen att fatta välgrundade och affärsmässiga rekryteringsbeslut. För dig handlar Talent Acquisition inte bara om att tillsätta en tjänst – utan om att skapa långsiktig kompetensförsörjning.
   

  

 Du har ett strukturerat och noggrant arbetssätt, men är samtidigt flexibel och lösningsorienterad när förutsättningarna förändras. I ett mindre team tar du naturligt ägarskap, samarbetar prestigelöst och bidrar till både leverans och utveckling.
   

  

**Mer formellt har du:**
* Relevant utbildningsbakgrund, gärna som personalvetare eller med motsvarande inriktning inom HR, beteendevetenskap eller ekonomi.
* Minst 4 års erfarenhet av en liknande roll som Talent Acquisition Specialist/Partner, gärna från IT-konsultbranschen.
* Erfarenhet av Teamtailor och LinkedIn Recruiter
* Goda kunskaper i både svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift


 Vi ser det som meriterande om du tidigare jobbar inom något av följande system: Sympa, OneFlow och RefApp.
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder?** 
  

  

 Vi är ett bolag som är på en spännande resa där People-funktionerna har ett viktigt uppdrag att bygga vidare Implema som den bästa arbetsgivaren i vår bransch. Vi tror på ett arbetsklimat där kunskap delas, initiativ uppmuntras och varje medarbetare får utvecklas - både professionellt och personligt.
   

  

 Med höga ambitioner och högt i tak skapar vi en miljö där det är lätt att trivas. För oss är det viktigt med work-life-balance och vi värnar om en trygg arbetsmiljö där du mår bra och känner dig sedd.
   

  

**Marknadsmässiga villkor och förmåner som stödjer dig**
 Utöver konkurrenskraftig lön erbjuder vi en flexibel hybridarbetsmodell, trygga pensions- och försäkringslösningar samt friskvårdbidrag. Dessutom bjuder vi in på sociala aktiviteter som after work, kickoff, våra egna fritidsklubbar, skidresor och konferensresor
   

  

 Implema är en av Sveriges ledande specialister på att snabbt implementera affärssystem baserat på marknadens ledande affärssystem SAP och Microsoft Dynamics. Med mer än 20 års erfarenhet av affärskritiska projekt guidar Implema svenska och internationella företag till effektiva och hållbara affärsprocesser och den snabbaste vägen till framtidens affärssystem. Vi vill finnas nära våra kunder och har kontor på 10 orter runt om i Sverige och omsätter 500 MSEK. Vi växer och vill bli fler!

title: Associate CFO Office
description:
As an Associate in the CFO Office, you will work at the center of EQT’s financial and strategic agenda. You will combine financial analysis, corporate finance and strategy, partnering closely with the CFO and senior leaders across the firm. This is a unique opportunity to gain broad exposure and contribute to high-impact initiatives in a global private markets organization.
   

  

**About The CFO Office Team**
 The CFO Office is a small, high-impact team working directly alongside EQT’s Chief Financial Officer. The team acts as an internal strategy and finance function for EQT’s leadership, supporting key decisions across the Group.
   

  

 EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization with more than EUR 230bn in assets under management and a presence across Europe, Asia-Pacific and the Americas. Within this global context, the CFO Office plays a central role in shaping the firm’s financial direction, supporting M&A, structuring and corporate development initiatives, and strengthening financial communication with investors and stakeholders.
   

  

**About The Role**
 In this role, you will contribute to a wide range of strategic and financial initiatives. You will work across M&A, structuring, financial analysis, reporting and investor relations, collaborating closely with senior stakeholders across the organization.
   

  

**Key responsibilities will include:**
* Support the CFO function in M&A processes, structuring and corporate finance initiatives.
* Build financial models and conduct in-depth analysis to inform strategic decisions.
* Contribute to financial reporting and the preparation of investor relations materials.
* Drive strategic projects from problem framing through analysis to clear recommendations.
* Identify and implement process improvements, including the use of digital tools and AI.
* Partner cross-functionally with Finance, Business Development, Legal, Investor Relations and Valuations teams.


 This role offers significant exposure and responsibility, with the opportunity to influence decisions at the highest level of the organization.
   

  

**About You**
 You are analytical, curious and motivated by working on complex financial and strategic topics. You enjoy turning data into insight and insight into action. You are comfortable engaging with senior stakeholders and thrive in a collaborative, fast-moving environment.
   

  

**Essential skills and experience:**
* 2–4 years of experience in Financial Due Diligence, Transaction Services, M&A advisory or a similar analytical role.
* Strong financial analysis and accounting skills, with confidence working with complex data and models.
* Solid understanding of corporate finance principles and transaction processes.
* Clear communication skills, with the ability to translate complex analysis into concise and structured narratives.
* A proactive mindset and the ability to manage multiple workstreams effectively.


**Nice to have:**
* Experience working on M&A transactions or corporate finance projects in an international environment.
* Interest in digital tools and AI, and experience applying them to improve processes or analysis.
* Exposure to the private markets or alternative asset management industry.


**What We Offer**
 At EQT, you will gain broad exposure across functions and geographies within a global private markets firm.
   

  

**You will benefit from:**
* Direct access to the CFO and senior leadership.
* Involvement in high-impact strategic and financial initiatives.
* A collaborative culture that welcomes new ideas and initiative.
* Competitive compensation and benefits.


 This is an opportunity to accelerate your development while contributing to the long-term success of EQT.
   

  

**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
*Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.*
**About EQT**
*EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of almost three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 269 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌136 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.*
*More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram*

title: Customer Excellence Coordinator (fixed term contract)
description:
At Fresenius Medical Care, we are the global leader in kidney care, dedicated to improving the lives of patients living with chronic kidney disease. Our mission is to deliver high-quality, innovative products, services, and care that support patients throughout their entire healthcare journey. Guided by our vision—
 **“Creating a future worth living. For patients. Worldwide. Every day.”** 
 —we operate with purpose and compassion, supported by a diverse team of
 **over 125,000 employees** 
 around the world.
   

  

 Within our
 **Care Enablement** 
 segment, we develop and supply life-sustaining medical products, digital health solutions, and therapies that empower clinical teams and improve patient outcomes. We are also driving transformation through our
 **FME Reignite** 
 strategy, which focuses on innovation, efficiency, and sustainable growth. Our values are the foundation of our culture:
   

  

  

* We Care for our patients, each other, and our communities.
* We Connect across teams and borders to deliver excellence together.
* We Commit to doing things the right way—growing with purpose and leading kidney care with integrity and innovation.


 Global Commercial, a key sub-function within
 **Care Enablement** 
 , plays a vital role in advancing Fresenius Medical Care’s mission to improve the lives of patients with chronic kidney disease. The team brings together
 **Sales, Marketing, Global Sales Excellence** 
 , and
 **Global Technical Operations** 
 , working collaboratively to deliver high-quality
 **medical devices** 
 ,
 **technical services** 
 , and impactful commercial strategies across global markets.
   

  

 We are looking for a Customer Excellence Coordinator who can support the Customer Excellence department in a 12-month employment while we update our SAP system.
   

  

 You will be part of a strong culture with 24 talented colleagues who look forward to welcoming you.
   

  

**Your tasks**
* Handle telephone and electronic order reception from patients
* Follow-up on daily orders, inbound and outbound
* Answer inquiries from hospitals, patients and technicians via telephone and email
* Handle return orders and credit
* Pack / ship HD & PD equipment, and loan equipment
* Work with GDP (Good Distribution Practice) related tasks


 You will have a broad contact surface with, among others, healthcare staff and home patients on a daily basis. Therefore, it is important that you can familiarize yourself with this world and that you as a person show understanding, calmness and patience.
   

  

**Your profile**
* several years of experience with customer service and thrive on having contact with many different people during the course of a day
* a professional attitude that is demonstrated by a high level of quality and a result and patient-oriented working style; an empathetic approach to patients and partners, and you are passionate about helping others
* very detail-oriented, as you will be handling orders for products for vital treatments
* good IT skills in SAP, preferably the sales and delivery module
* knowledge of GDP (Good Distribution Practice)
* good prioritization and coordination skills and is good at keeping an overview
* prepared for a day-to-day life where your work tasks must occasionally be reprioritized at short notice
* fluent in speaking and writing in Swedish and English


 It is important that you are a team player and have a "can-do" attitude, but also that you can work independently. You have a high drive and thrive in a dynamic everyday life. At FME, no two days are the same. We have many deadlines and a high work pace, so it is important that you can keep an overview and thrive working under pressure. We are also part of a Nordic Hub that includes Sweden, Finland and Denmark and we work closely with the Commercial Services departments in these countries.
   

  

**We offer**
* FME is the world's largest provider of products and services for the treatment of chronic and acute renal failure and immunotherapy. FME produces dialysis equipment for hospitals and also supplies to patients in home treatment.
* We have a flat organizational structure, and high demands are placed on the independence of the individual employee. The environment is characterized by an open, social and unique culture.
* You will have a versatile and exciting everyday life in an international company that gives you the opportunity to influence what affects your everyday life. We offer a temporaty full-time position with an attractive salary + pension, as well as a committed staff association that organizes social events several times a year.

title: Integrationskonsult
description:
*Vill du vara en nyckelspelare i våra kunders framgång genom att sammankoppla system och processer i både on-prem- och cloudlösningar? Då har du kommit rätt! Detta är ett ständigt växande och spännande område! Vi som arbetar med integration på VASS skapar värde genom att förstå arkitektur, processer, systemförmågor och hur man på bästa sätt kan få ut och använda data ur respektive lösning.* 




  





**Om rollen** 




 Som konsult inom Integration hos VASS blir du en nyckelspelare i att hjälpa våra kunder att skapa ytterligare värde i sin affär. Ditt uppdrag är att omsätta affärsbehov till moderna och effektiva integrationslösningar, oftast baserat på Microsofts molnplattform Azure eller inom SAP. Med djup förståelse för kundens affär och processer hjälper du kunden bygga mer effektiva lösningar och att skapa värden som de tidigare inte sett.
 



  





 Inom detta område ser vi behov av både arkitekter och utvecklare framåt. Vi tror på värdet av att vara en del i någonting större, en gemenskap, och att det får oss alla att både kunna leverera starkare i uppdraget och helt enkelt bli ännu bättre, ännu snabbare än om vi arbetar ens
 



 kilt.I denna roll kombineras teknisk skicklighet med strategisk insikt, helst arbetandes sida vid sida med dina kollegor på VASS. Vill du ta din karriär till nästa nivå? Välkommen att ansöka!
 



  





**Dina kompetenser och egenskaper** 



* Utbildning som ingenjör, data- eller systemvetare, eller arbetslivserfarenheter som demonstrerar en stark förmåga att sätta sig in i och lösa problem.
* Tidigare erfarenhet av Microsofts eller SAPs produkter tjänster inom Integration, gärna inom moln och gärna i rollen som konsult
* +4 års erfarenhet
* Förstår vikten av göra det lilla extra när det behövs men kan samtidigt ge sig själv (och andra) en paus när det behövs.
* Trivs i att verka i en föränderlig miljö och inser att flexibilitet är en superkraft.
* Vågar ta hjälp och även hjälpa andra.
* Nyfiken.



  





**Mer om rollen** 




 Vi rekryterar löpande och ser gärna att du kan börja så snart som möjligt men månar om att hitta rätt person. Därför värderar vi dina personliga egenskaper och att vi trivs ihop högt.
 



  





 Har du frågor eller funderingar? Kontakta rekryterande chef Andreas Åkerblad på andreas.akerblad@vasscompany.com.
 



  





**Om VASS** 




 Med en kombinerad kraft av 250 lokala experter, och fler än 4 000 globala kollegor inom VASS, tar vi en ledande roll inom IT- och management-konsulting. Vi tar fram strategier, designar och realiserar tjänster som inte bara uppfyller kundens behov, utan också driver deras affär framåt. Vårt arbete går från idé till genomförande och vidareutveckling, med fokus på människan, tekniken och affären. Vår framgång bygger på engagerade team av drivna kollegor. Vill du vara en del av vår framgång?
 



  





 Hos VASS står du alltid i fokus. Här får du utrymme att påverka din utveckling och möjligheten att växa i nya roller. Vi rustar dig med rätt kunskap och de rätta verktygen för din professionella och personliga utvecklingsresa. När du växer, växer företag.

title: Creative Lead Partner for In-house Agency at Group Brand Marketing & Communications
description:
**Job ID: 3252**
 Are you ready to shape the creative heartbeat of a leading financial brand? Are you a creative strategic thinker with a forward-leaning mindset of solving business challenges through innovative branded experiences? Keep reading.
   

  

 We are growing our inhouse agency team and now looking for a visionary creative to join a dynamic team that transforms impactful ideas through creative intelligence to make big measurable impact for the largest financial services providers in Nordics.
   

  

 We are for people who want to move forward
   

  

 When working at Nordea, you come as you are. We believe that great minds don’t think alike, and all perspectives are valuable to move forward for something better – for yourself, your colleagues, customers, shareholders and society at large.
   

  

 We are passionate about serving our customers, and we are dedicated to maintaining an inspiring and welcoming environment, daily, for our colleagues and partners. Because in the end, Nordea is all about making tomorrow a little better than today. That’s the Nordic Idea we’re built upon. We call it “The idea of something better”. You are welcome to join us on that journey.
   

  

**About This Opportunity**
 This position is based in any of the Nordic Capital cities within our in-house agency Nordea Group Creative.
   

  

 We are seeking a Creative Lead Partner to join our growing in-house agency team developing innovative, impactful 360 brand activations across the Nordics. We’re looking for someone who thrives at the intersection of creativity, strategy, and flawless execution - ready to shape bold ideas into unforgettable and authentic brand experiences.
   

  

 An entrepreneurial personality that is passionate about creativity and strategy, thrives in fast-paced environments, and loves being a true partner in the creative development process. If you love turning consumer insights into magic together with others to deliver world-class creative work, this is your moment.
   

  

 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in how we work and how we make decisions – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead through collaboration: Develop concepts for advertising and brand engagement to set the creative direction for brand activation ideas, customer value propositions and asset production projects aligned with business targets and brand platform identity.
* Partner for success: Work closely with creatives, project managers and other key stakeholders across the organization to translate complex challenges into compelling creative solutions and communication.
* Inspire teams and agency partners: Facilitate creative processes and guide copy writers, videographers and art directors to jointly achieve excellence in both development and execution.
* Champion innovation: Stay ahead of trends, technologies, media and cultural shifts to keep our creative output fresh and relevant for key target audiences in various channels and touchpoints.


**Who You Are**
* An experienced Creative Director and Strategist at a creative agency working with global brands.
* Strong portfolio showcasing creative excellence, strategic thinking and breakthrough ideas.
* Exceptional communication and collaboration skills.
* Champion a collaborative, solutions-oriented approach within cross-functional teams across markets.
* Ability to balance big-picture vision with hands-on execution.
* Passion for storytelling, design, and brand building.
* Collaborative mindset with a bias for action and problem-solving.


**Qualifications**
* Degree or Diploma in Advertising, Creative and Digital Development
* 7-10+ years of Marketing Communication Experience
* Proven ability to develop fully integrated omnichannel brand concepts from briefing to final production.
* Ability to research and uncover insights that connect brand, product, and consumer behavior.
* Fluent in English and at least one Scandinavian Language
* Preferred: Familiarity with compliance and brand considerations in financial services or other regulated environments.


**What We Offer**
 People come here when they want to get somewhere. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

 A culture that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

 Hybrid working model – we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility. Diversity and inclusion are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one.
   

  

 We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together.
   

  

 Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 31/03/2026. For more information, you’re welcome to contact Annika Vangstad at Annika.Vangstad@nordea.com. Interviews will be held continuously. Applications must contain a link to a creative portfolio.
   

  

 We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.
   

  

 We build relationships. We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

 We learn and develop. We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

 We lead change. We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

 We are Nordea. We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

 Studies show that members of underrepresented communities don’t apply for jobs unless they tick all the qualification boxes. If this is part of why you hesitate to apply, we would like you to reconsider and give it a chance. Maybe your profile fits our needs much better than you think.
   

  

**For candidates in Finland:** 
 A security clearance will be performed for the person selected for this position.
   

  

**For candidates in Sweden:** 
 For union information, please contact finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACONordea@nordea.com.

title: Senior Research Engineer - AI Bots
description:
**Description & Requirements**
 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

 SEED is a pioneering group within Electronic Arts, combining creativity with applied research. We explore, build, and help define the future of interactive entertainment.
   

  

 We exist at EA to deliver and foster inspiring innovation for our games and our players. We do this through exploration, research, prototypes, and never-ending curiosity. We collaborate with game teams and industry partners and also publish our research within our industry and to the public. We pursue long-term applied research yet stay relevant to the present by delivering artifacts along the way to game teams and technology groups inside EA. Some of our research includes bringing digital characters to life, using machine learning for game AI and content creation, and developing novel real-time graphics & physics techniques.
   

  

 We are looking for a Senior Research Engineer to join the Intelligent Agents research vector to create the next generation of game AI. Our work centers on the latest technologies, including Reinforcement Learning, Language Models, and Imitation Learning. The Intelligent Agents team collaborates directly with game studios to create agent solutions today, while also driving toward our long-term goal of developing the next generation of interactive and reasoning agents for players. The team has a track record, having deployed machine learning (ML) agents in FC26 and testing ML agents for the Battlefield franchise. You will focus on foundation models, Language Models (LMs) and Action Models for the purpose of novel AI experiences. This is an applied role. You will translate your ideas into functional demonstrations (e.g. demos) to guide innovation in a very practical way.
   

  

 This is a hybrid remote/in-office role - 3 days/week at the office - from our SEED office in Stockholm, Sweden. You will report to our Intelligent Agents research vector lead.
   

  

**As a Research Engineer At SEED, You Will**
* Develop novel ideas by researching and implementing solutions to some of the most complex challenges in video game AI, helping create difference for EA.
* Contribute to applied research in areas such as Language Models, Reinforcement Learning, and reasoning. This includes proposing new use cases and algorithms for player-facing game AI agents, while targeting real-time, on-device performance.
* Build compelling demos that highlight novel applications of AI agents, NPC behaviors, and game AI bots, with a focus on integration into game engines.
* Share your impact by publishing your work, contributing to open-source, and presenting at conferences.


 As a diverse team with solid goals, we provide autonomy and true influence to each member of SEED. We are looking for an open and curious person; someone who gets a kick out of taking new ideas, investigating them, and adapting their application to games. You have a desire to explore new areas of game development - someone who is passionate, creative, communicative, and invested.
   

  

**Requirements**
* A degree in Computer Science, a STEM field, or equivalent practical experience related to game AI.
* 8+ years of experience in software development, game development, or other relevant roles demonstrating the ability to build real-time game AI experiences.
* Partner with other researchers, engineers, artists, and designers.
* Experience turning ideas into functional prototypes or demos that showcase concepts in practice.
* Excellent programming abilities and ability to explain complex concepts.
* Experience with runtime-compiled languages (e.g., C++, C#) and scripting languages (e.g., Python).
* Working knowledge of game engines such as Unity, Unreal, Godot, or similar technologies.
* A genuine interest in video games paired with a critical understanding of how AI is built in games, including the ability to form your own insights on how you can improve it.


**Additional Qualifications**
* PhD degree in Computer Science or a STEM field.
* Experience with Language Models (LLMs, SLMs), Reinforcement Learning, and Imitation Learning.
* Experience with publications in peer-reviewed conferences or journals.
* Openness to travel for conferences and visit teams across EA studios.


 If you want to be part of — and work with — some of the most incredible people in the field, then this role is for you!
   

  

 To learn more about SEED and our impactful work, check out https://seed.ea.com/
   

  

**About Electronic Arts**
 We’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.
   

  

 Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.

title: Sr Creative Executive, Nordic Originals, Amazon MGM Studios
description:
**Description**
 Are you passionate about creating world-class content and driving innovation in entertainment? Amazon MGM Studios is seeking an experienced Sr Creative Executive who will be responsible for supporting the evaluation, development, and delivery of original content while demonstrating ownership over a specific content vertical or territory.
   

  

 In this role, you will assist in identifying and championing compelling stories that resonate with our global customer base, while building and maintaining relationships with top-tier creative talent. You'll leverage data-driven insights alongside your creative intuition to make recommendations about content development for the Nordics.
   

  

 As a Sr Creative Executive, you'll work cross-functionally with multiple teams including Production, Business Affairs, Marketing, and Data Analytics to ensure projects move efficiently from development through production.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Support the creative development process for a portfolio of original content
* Collaborate with creators, writers, and producers to help develop series and features
* Partner cross-functionally with Production, Business Affairs, and Marketing teams
* Provide actionable creative feedback throughout development and production
* Use data insights to support creative decisions while maintaining artistic integrity
* Scale development processes through documentation and best practices


**Basic Qualifications**
* Multiple years of entertainment industry experience in content development
* Track record of successfully developing and executing multiple content projects
* Experience providing creative notes and feedback to creators and stakeholders
* Demonstrated ability to identify marketable creative elements in pitches and submissions
* Strong editorial judgment and story development skills
* Experience managing writer and talent relationships
* Proven ability to give constructive script notes that elevate material
* History of successfully packaging and developing IP into viable content
* Fluency in Swedish and English


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Demonstrated ability to identify and nurture compelling, commercially viable stories
* Strong narrative instincts and ability to provide incisive script notes
* Experience working with data-driven decision making tools
* Proven track record of packaging projects with high-profile talent
* Excellent understanding of story structure across various formats (series, features, limited series)
* Ability to articulate creative vision and align stakeholders around it
* Experience supporting a development slate and prioritizing projects
* Strong knowledge of current market trends and emerging storytelling techniques
* Prior experience at a major streaming service, studio, or network
* Proficiency in evaluating and developing content across multiple genres


 Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.
   

  

 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 - Amazon Corporate Services Sweden AB
   

  

 Job ID: A3083119

title: Innesäljare
description:
På Too Good To Go har vi ett ambitiöst uppdrag: att inspirera och möjliggöra för alla att tillsammans bekämpa matsvinn.
   

  

 Mer än en tredjedel av all mat som produceras i världen slängs. Det har en enorm påverkan på vår planet. 10 % av de globala växthusgasutsläppen kommer från matsvinn och livsmedelsförluster.
   

  

 Genom vår app kopplar vi samman företag som har osåld, överbliven mat med konsumenter som kan köpa och njuta av den till upp till reducerade priser.
   

  

 Som Sales Specialist kommer du att spela en nyckelroll i vårt uppdrag genom att utveckla och underhålla relationer med handlare samt övertyga dem om att ansluta sig till Too Good To Go i kampen mot matsvinn.
   

  

**Rollen**
 Sales Specialist rapporterar direkt till Sales Team Lead. Några av dina ansvarsområden inkluderar:
   

  

**Prospektering & Försäljning**
* Bygga upp ett starkt nätverk av partners genom telefonbaserad prospektering.
* Använda dina bästa argument och förhandlingsfärdigheter för att presentera fördelarna med vår lösning och övertyga partners att ansluta sig till vår rörelse mot matsvinn.


**Account Management**
* Ge regelbunden uppföljning till partners för att säkerställa deras nöjdhet och engagemang under deras första månad i appen.
* Stödja partners i användningen av vår plattform och säkerställa att de fullt ut förstår appen samt integrerar minskning av matsvinn i sin dagliga verksamhet.


**Vi Söker Dig Som**
* Tror på det värde som Too Good To Go-appen kan erbjuda partners.
* Är bekväm med att prata i telefon och har en naturlig lätthet i samtal.
* Gärna har viss erfarenhet av försäljningsprospektering.
* Gillar att ta dig an utmaningar och visar uthållighet.
* Har mycket god kommunikationsförmåga, både muntligt och skriftligt.
* Är empatisk och en god lyssnare.
* Har goda kunskaper i både svenska och engelska.


**Våra värderingar**
 We Win Together
   

  

 We Raise the Bar
   

  

 We Keep It Simple
   

  

 We Build A Legacy
   

  

 We Care
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder**
* En unik möjlighet att arbeta i ett socialt impact-bolag (och certifierat B Corporation!) där du ser konkret och meningsfull påverkan
* Samarbete med en internationell gemenskap av användare, partners och över 1 100 kollegor i 19 länder med samma viktiga uppdrag
* Möjligheter till personlig och professionell utveckling i en snabbväxande scale-up-miljö
* En inkluderande företagskultur där du kan vara dig själv på jobbet
* Majoriteten av arbetstiden sker på vårt fina kontor tillsammans med teamet, men möjlighet till distansarbete finns.
* En stark, värderingsdriven teamkultur där vi firar framgångar och har kul tillsammans


*A Movement for Everyone*
*We want to inspire and empower everyone to fight food waste together. With that mission, it’s only natural that we want to build a diverse and inclusive team of highly capable individuals who are passionate about doing things in a better way. We strongly believe we all excel and are more creative when we’re allowed to be ourselves, and we’re committed to a culture where all of us belong.*
*We are an equal opportunity employer and all employment is decided on the basis of qualifications, merit and business need. If you need reasonable accommodation at any point in the application or interview process, please let us know.*

title: Lösningsarkitekt
description:
**Om Connecting Stockholm** 




 Som ansvariga för Stockholms tunnelbana driver vi en samhällsbärande verksamhet där säkerhet, tillgänglighet och punktlighet står i centrum. Vi kombinerar erfarenhet och nytänkande för att skapa en tunnelbana som är trygg idag och hållbar för framtiden.
 



  





 Men vårt uppdrag handlar om mer än trafik – det handlar om människor, ansvar och tillit. Varje dag möter vi hundratusentals resenärer, och genom ett varmt, respektfullt och professionellt bemötande skapar vi en reseupplevelse där alla känner sig varmt välkomna och trygga. Hos oss är kulturen lika viktig som uppdraget. Vi tror på samarbetets kraft, på relationer som bygger förtroende och på ett ledarskap som präglas av professionalism, hjärta och engagemang.
 



  





 Vi drivs av utveckling – både av vår verksamhet och våra medarbetare. Hos oss får du möjlighet att växa, påverka och vara med och forma framtidens kollektivtrafik – tillsammans med oss.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Vill du arbeta nära verksamheten och vara en nyckelperson i utvecklingen av hållbara, moderna och robusta IT-lösningar? Connecting Stockholm söker nu en lösningsarkitekt som vill ta en central roll i vår fortsatta digitaliseringsresa. Som lösningsarkitekt blir du en del av grupp Digitalisering, som består av ett BI-team, system- och integrationsutvecklare, testledare, kravledare och lösningsarkitekter. Gruppen arbetar tätt tillsammans med verksamheten och har korta beslutsvägar, högt engagemang och en stark vilja att skapa digitala lösningar som gör skillnad. Här arbetar du i en tekniskt stark miljö där du får möjlighet att påverka arkitekturella vägval, etablera strukturer och bidra till organisationens målarkitektur. 
 



  
 



**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter** 



* Utforma, beskriva och förankra lösningsarkitektur i både projekt och förvaltning.
* Arbeta strategiskt, taktiskt och operativt med att säkerställa hållbara IT‑lösningar som ligger i linje med verksamhetens mål.
* Driva framtagandet av innovativa IT‑lösningar utifrån verksamhetskrav, arkitekturprinciper och omvärldsanalys.
* Stödja projekt från idéstadiet till implementering, drift och förvaltning.
* Identifiera och dokumentera funktionella och icke‑funktionella krav, inklusive SLA‑nivåer.
* Skapa och underhålla arkitekturleverabler såsom Architecture Definition Documents (ADD enligt TOGAF) och Solution Architecture Descriptions (SAD).
* Utveckla och förvalta organisationens målarkitektur.
* Kommunicera och förankra tekniska vägval hos både tekniska och icke‑tekniska intressenter.
* Delta i och ibland leda arkitekturråd, styrgrupper och tekniska forum.
* Säkerställa att lösningar följer säkerhetsprinciper, standarder och god praxis.



  





**Kvalifikationer** 



* Högskoleutbildning inom IT, systemvetenskap eller motsvarande.
* Flera års erfarenhet som lösningsarkitekt, systemarkitekt eller liknande.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att designa skalbara, robusta och säkra IT-lösningar.
* Erfarenhet av arkitekturmodeller och ramverk (t.ex. C4‑modellen, ArchiMate, UML).
* God förståelse för säkerhet, identitetshantering och åtkomstmodeller.
* Förmåga att analysera komplexa beroenden i hybridmiljöer (cloud/on‑prem).
* Erfarenhet av att leda tekniska diskussioner och facilitera arbete i tvärfunktionella team.
* Styrka i att fatta tekniska beslut och motivera dem utifrån affärsnytta och långsiktig förvaltningsbarhet.
* Mycket god kommunikativ förmåga.
* Svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.



  





**Meriterande kvalifikationer** 



* Huvudansvar för ADD eller andra arkitekturleverabler i projekt.
* Erfarenhet av projekt enligt ISO 27001.
* Certifiering inom IT-arkitektur.
* Kunskap inom Microsofts arkitekturlösningar.
* Erfarenhet av arkitekturråd, styrgrupper eller tekniska forum.
* Erfarenhet från verksamhetstunga projekt med många intressenter.



  





**Övrigt** 




 Anställningsform: Tillsvidare.
 



 Omfattning: Heltid.
 



 Startdatum: Enligt överenskommelse.
 



 Placering: Stockholm.
 



 Anställningen omfattas av kollektivavtal och erbjuder bland annat SL-kort, friskvårdsbidrag, lunchförmån och rabatterade försäkringar.
 



  
 



**Om rekryteringsprocessen** 




 Vi tillämpar kompetensbaserad rekrytering och strävar efter en rättvis och inkluderande process. Som en del av urvalet kan urvalsfrågor och tester användas för att säkerställa en objektiv bedömning. Referenstagning, alkohol- och drogtest samt eventuell bakgrundskontroll kan genomföras innan beslut om anställning fattas.
 



 Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via e-post. Vid frågor kontakta rekryteringen via rekrytering@connectingstockholm.se.

title: SAP Retail Architect
description:
Are you ready for the next step in your SAP career? Do you want to work in a flexible environment with exciting assignments. We are now looking for a SAP Retail Architect who wants to help shape the solutions of the future. Welcome to CGI!
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

 The SAP Retail Consultant would be responsible for implementing and supporting SAP Retail solutions, enabling retail businesses to optimize merchandising, sales, and supply chain operations. You would act as a bridge between business stakeholders and the technical team, ensuring SAP solutions meet the functional requirements of retail processes.
   

  

 You will also:
   

  

* Design and develop SAP retail solutions for our retail clients.
* Participating in pre-studies, requirements analysis, and solution design together with clients and project teams.
* Providing advisory services and acting as an expert in SAP for both projects and application management.
* Driving process improvements and innovation using SAP’s latest technologies.


 Our clients are at different stages of their S/4HANA journey – from planning to full implementation – and you will play a central role in guiding them through this transformation.
   

  

**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
* 5+ years of SAP Retail implementation or support experience.
* Experience conducting workshops with business teams to gather requirements and map business processes to SAP best practices.
* Ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions.
