* Strong communication skills and experience working in complex project environments and fluency in Swedish and English, both spoken and written.
* Experience with integrations, cloud solutions, and SAP BTP is a plus.


 Strong understanding of retail processes including:
   

  

* Merchandise Management (MM, IS-Retail)
* Assortment and Assortment Planning
* Pricing and Promotions Management
* Store Operations (POS integration, Inventory Management)
* Forecasting, Replenishment, and Supply Chain
* Reporting and Analytics (BW/Embedded Analytics)


 You are great at building strong relationships and quickly understanding new situations. You enjoy working with others, are attentive and supportive, and like to challenge yourself. With both an analytical mindset and creative problem-solving skills, you handle complex tasks with precision and confidence.
   

  

**Want to Learn More?**
 We look forward to hearing from you! Applications will be reviewed continuously, and the position may be filled before the final application deadline. For further questions. please feel free to send your inquiries to Santosh Nimbhorkar, santosh.nimbhorkar@cgi.com
   

  

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: Systemutvecklare inom Adobe Experience Cloud/Campaign
description:
Vill du känna att ditt arbete betyder lite mer och att din uppgift är viktig? Vi letar efter dig som vill bidra till ett modernare, snabbare, mer affärsmässigt Folksam? Vi söker nu en systemutvecklarkollega som har kompetens och erfarenhet av att främst arbeta med Adobes Experience Cloud/Campaign.
 



  





 På avdelningen Kommunikation och betalning arbetar vi med de två domäner som har samma namn. De innehåller lite olika saker men är alla centrala i Folksams digitala kundupplevelse. I kommunikationsdomänen arbetar vi med säkra meddelanden, digitala formulär och olika notifieringslösningar. Där finns Adobe Experience Cloud/Campaign med som en naturlig del. Den här tjänsten är riktad just mot AEC men med möjlighet att arbete i andra delar av de domäner som avdelningen och sektionen arbetar med. Dina närmaste kollegor i det agila teamet är också utvecklare.
 



  





 Hos oss blir du en del av en av stor IT-organisation med över 700 medarbetare, moderna tekniker och en kultur som präglas av innovation, samarbete och omtanke.
 



  





**Det här gör du som systemutvecklare på Folksam** 




 På Folksam har vi använt Adobes produkter under lång tid men är nu halvvägs in i en migrering till AEC för att kunna utnyttja hela potentialen i Adobes produkt.
 



 Vi arbetar tätt med andra team på Folksam så som app och mina sidor. I framtiden ser vi att vi kommer att arbeta mer eventdrivet med hjälp av Kafka där vi redan gjort några POC:ar. Du ingår i avdelningen Kommunikation och betalning under sektionen Digital kundupplevelse.
 



  





 Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter är att:
 


* Bygga och förvalta integrationer i Adobe mot interna och externa system.
* Bistå Kundutveckling med funktionalitet mot de behov som finns.



 Vill du veta mer om hur det är att jobba som systemutvecklare på vår IT-avdelning, då kan du läsa här.
 



  





**Är du den vi söker?** 




 Vi söker dig som har:
 


* Arbetat med att bygga ut funktionalitet och moduler i Adobes ekosystem.
* Byggt och förvaltat SMS och E-post - notifieringar och tillhörande infrastruktur.
* Kompetens och erfarenhet i JavaScript.



  





 Vi tror att du har arbetat några år som systemutvecklare och vill bidra tillsammans med teamet för att varje dag göra Folksam lite bättre.
 



  





 Som person är du självgående och driver ditt arbete framåt och uppnår resultat. Du har en god förmåga att samarbeta och utveckla lösningar tillsammans med andra.
 



 Här kan du läsa mer om vår IT avdelning och den resa vi är på!
 



  





**Här kan du göra skillnad** 




 Välkommen till Folksam – här driver du viktiga frågor framåt. Från de avgörande detaljerna till de stora perspektiven, med fokus på att förenkla våra kunders vardag. Det gör att du bidrar till något större, oavsett roll. Här finns det många roliga, utvecklande jobb och du har goda chanser till en spännande karriär.
 



  





 Vi tror på ett hållbart arbetsliv och jobbar aktivt med inkludering och mångfald. Våra moderna kontor bjuder in till samarbete och lärande, här får vi saker att hända! Du har flexibiliteten att kunna varva arbete på kontoret med att jobba hemifrån, utifrån verksamhetens behov.
 



 Läs mer och se filmer om livet hos oss på folksam.se/jobb-och-karriar.
 



  





**Så söker du jobbet** 




 Välkommen att skicka in din ansökan senast 22 mars 2026.
 



  





 Vill du veta mer om jobbet är du välkommen att kontakta avdelningschef Per Ruthström, per.ruthstrom@folksam.se.
 



  





 Fackliga representanter: Akademikerföreningen Per Hansson 070-831 60 67, Forena Morgan Svensson 073-423 59 12 och Handels Mikael Carlsson 070-831 51 32.
 



  





*Kundägda Folksamgruppen erbjuder sedan 1908 försäkringar och sparande som ger trygghet i livets alla skeden. Vi gör det enklare för våra fyra miljoner kunder att känna sig trygga i en hållbar värld genom rätt försäkringar, rätt sparande och rätt hjälp när något händer.*

title: Processledare inom balansering
description:
Vill du vara en del av en dynamisk arbetsplats där du tillsammans med kompetenta kollegor verkligen gör skillnad för ett hållbart och lysande Sverige. Då kan det här vara jobbet för dig.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 Som Processledare inom balansering kommer du att ansvara för att utveckla, förbättra och förvalta processer för det operativa arbetet i kontrollrummet. I ett tätt samarbete med dina kollegor på Svenska kraftnät och våra motsvarigheter i Norden kommer du vara med i arbetet att utveckla balanseringsprocessen. Du är kravställare mot verksamhetsprojekt, IT och samordnare mot övriga funktioner med koppling mot kontrollrummet. Vidare innebär tjänsten bland annat:
   

  

* tät kontakt med operatörer i det nationella kontrollrummet och aktörerna på elmarknaden
* analyser och utredningar för utveckling av verktyg och processer i kontrollrummet
* kontinuerlig uppföljning och förbättring av operativa processer för att säkerställa hög driftsäkerhet.


 Som Processledare hos Svenska kraftnät, som befinner sig i en kraftig tillväxt och en föränderlig arbetsmiljö, kommer du att hantera flera komplexa utmaningar. Arbetet kommer att innebära ansvar för en eller flera processer inom huvudprocessen Operativt säkerställa effektbalans. Detta kommer att innebära att du leder och samordnar operativt arbete, driver utredningar och säkerställer framdrift i utvecklingsfrågor. Du kommer att navigera mellan olika intressenters behov, genomföra uppföljning och analyser av incidenter och driva arbete kopplat till kontinuitet och fallbackhantering.
   

  

 Som Processledare på Driften har du stora utvecklingsmöjligheter. Du får bredda din kompetens inom balanseringen av kraftsystemet, marknadsutveckling och processutveckling samtidigt som du vara med och påverka din roll. Du kommer att delta i projekt, såväl nordisk som europeiskt.
   

  

 Enheten består idag av 13 medarbetare som dels är specialiserade inom olika områden samtidigt som vi utbyter erfarenheter och arbetar mycket tillsammans. Enheten ansvarar för de operativa processerna vilket innebär arbete med bland annat utveckling av marknader, processer och IT-verktyg för balansering samt upphandlingsoptimering.
   

  

**Om dig**
**Skallkrav:**
 Du är en person som fattar välgrundade beslut även i komplexa och tidspressade situationer. Du trivs i samarbeten och bidrar till ett öppet och positivt arbetsklimat genom tydlig kommunikation och ett prestigelöst förhållningssätt. Samtidigt är du analytisk och lösningsorienterad och arbetar strukturerat. Genom att vara transparent och uppriktig skapar du förtroende och trygghet i organisationen.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Du har även:
   

  

 Civilingenjörs- eller masterexamen med relevant inriktning som exempelvis energisystem.
   

  

* Din kommunikativa förmåga att kunna uttrycka dig på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift är god.


 Det är
 **meriterande** 
 om du har kunskap och erfarenhet av:
   

  

* erfarenhet från energibranschen med relevant kunskap inom kraftsystemet och elmarknadens funktion
* relevant kunskap inom balansmarknader och balanseringsprocessen
* erfarenhet av processorienterat arbetssätt
* erfarenhet av kontinuitetsarbete och framtagande av instruktioner
* erfarenhet av kontrollrumsarbete


**Bra att veta**
* Tjänsten är placerad i Stockholm/Sundbyberg
* Möjlighet till distansarbete upp till 50 %
* Kan förekomma upp till en gång per månad, främst inom Norden.
* Sista ansökningsdag, 2026-03-20, vi använder urvalsfrågor istället för personligt brev.
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning och provanställning kan bli aktuellt
* Förmåner | Svenska kraftnät


 Vid frågor om tjänsten kontakta gärna rekryterande chef Maria Erikssson 010-475 86 55, vid frågor om rekryteringsprocessen kontakta ansvarig rekryterare AnnSophie Doverlind 010-475 80 07, Fackliga representanter är Annika Ingeborn, SACO, 010 475 87 72 och Erica Midfjäll ST, 010 475 87 31. Du når oss också via e-post: fornamn.efternamn@svk.se
   

  

 Jobba här – bli en viktig del av vår energiframtid | Svenska kraftnät
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare i samband med rekrytering, vi har upphandlade avtal som gäller för Svenska kraftnät som statlig myndighet.
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan ett beslut om anställning fattas kommer en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) att genomföras i de fall befattningen innebär hantering av säkerhetsskyddsklassificerade uppgifter eller deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet. Om anställningen avser befattning i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövningen även att innefatta en registerkontroll och, i vissa fall, en särskild personutredning. För anställning på Svenska kraftnät kan det vara ett krav på svenskt medborgarskap i vissa befattningar. Med anställningen följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. För mer information om säkerhetsprövning Svenska kraftnät arbetar för att främja mångfald och motverka diskriminering och ser gärna sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter till våra rekryteringar. Lär känna Svenska kraftnät och hur det är att arbeta hos oss: Lär känna oss på Svenska kraftnät

title: Scrum Master/RTE
description:
**Företagsbeskrivning**
 AFRY erbjuder tjänster inom teknik, design, digitalisering och rådgivning. Vi är dedikerade experter inom industri, energi och infrastruktur och skapar värde för kommande generationer. AFRY har nordiska rötter med global räckvidd. Våra gemensamma principer – Result driven, Client centric, Empowering och Accountable – vägleder oss i hur vi arbetar, utvecklas och lyckas tillsammans. Var med och accelerera övergången till ett hållbart samhälle.
   

  

**Jobbeskrivning**
 Vi söker nu hängivna Scrum Masters och Release Train Engineers (RTE) som tror på den agila metoden.
   

  

 På sektionen Project Management inom enheten Connected Products så kommer du att få jobba med produktutveckling av högteknologiska och intelligenta produkter för framtidens hållbara värld. Som Scrum Master/RTE hos oss på AFRY blir du en del av ett fantastiskt och otroligt kompetent gäng kollegor som tillsammans arbetar för att skapa innovativa och hållbara lösningar tillsammans med våra kunder. Vi arbetar brett med kunder i många olika branscher, allt ifrån banker och mobilitet till de vassaste produktbolagen i regionen.
   

  

 Som Scrum Master ansvarar du för att teamet följer den agila processen, du har ansvar för att organisera och leda planeringssessioner, sprint reviews och allt som ingår i Scrum för att leverera en bättre produkt för varje sprint. Du ansvarar också för att coacha organisationen i Scrum/agila processer
   

  

 Som Release Train Engineer(RTE) ansvarar du för att facilitera Agile Release Train (ART ) enligt SAFe ramverket, du har ansvar för att organisera och leda planeringssessioner(PI planning) reviews och allt som ingår i att leda ett ART. Du ansvarar också för att coacha Scrummasters och teamledare i den agila processen.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
**Din bakgrund**
* Du har flera års erfarenhet från en liknande roll eller så har du arbetat i agila team ett antal år och vill ta klivet upp till Scrum Master/RTE
* Du har minst ett par års erfarenhet av produktutveckling SW eller HW (dock ej från IT-förvaltning/drift)
* Du har relevant utbildning inom området (MSc, BSc eller liknande)
* Eftersom vi arbetar mot många internationella kunder krävs det även att du kommunicerar obehindrat såväl muntligt som skriftligt på svenska och engelska. För denna tjänst behöver du även vara bosatt i Sverige
* Du är van att organisera/leda möten och andra aktiviteter samt stötta ditt team
* Vidare har du även erfarenhet av krav och behovs-hantering och är van att sammanställa dessa till konkreta och realistiska mål


**Meriterande aspekter**
* Certifierad ScrumMaster och/eller certifierad SAFe RTE eller Agilist


 Våra värdeord Brave, Devoted & Teamplayers kännetecknar hur vi ser på oss själva. Du kommer trivas hos oss om du är en prestigelös person med fokus på långsiktighet och kvalitet. Du ser lösningar där andra ser problem vilket innebär att du även har god analytisk-och problemlösande förmåga. I rollen ingår det att coacha och stötta dina teammedlemmar vilket är något du bör ha erfarenhet av. Du trivs i och är van vid att leda agila team i en utvecklingsmiljö.
   

  

 I denna roll har du kontakt med många olika personer i verksamheten, därför är det även av stor vikt att du är en duktig kommunikatör som har förmågan att förklara det komplexa på ett enkelt sätt.
   

  

**Ytterligare information**
**Välkommen med din ansökan!**
**Kontaktperson för frågor:**
 Maja Lindqvist, Rekryteringspartner
   

  

 maja.lindqvist@afry.com
   

  

 För samtliga rekryteringar på AFRY genomförs som grund alltid en ID-kontroll, referenstagning samt verifiering av utbildning.
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  

*På AFRY driver vi förändring i allt vi gör. Vi anser att förändring sker när modiga idéer möts, när vi samarbetar, skapar innovation och omfamnar kreativa lösningar, det är så vi skapar framtiden. Vi söker konstant kvalificerade kandidater som vill ansluta sig till våra inkluderande team runt om i världen. Bli en del av oss och påskynda den gröna omställningen*

title: SAP Analytics Sweden Senior Analyst
description:
***Junior SAP Analytics consultant to Accenture’s Nordic SAP Business Group***
 Do you have a passion for transforming businesses with the newest technologies and making them data-driven companies? Are you looking for a place where you could combine your business consulting skills with technology strategy know-how? Do you know how to bring value out of data?
   

  

 If Yes, bring your talent and passion to Accenture and help us deliver on the promise of technology and human ingenuity. Take this opportunity to develop your skills and build an extraordinary career! You will play a key role in transforming organizations and communities around the world. Let there be change!
   

  

**About Our Nordic SAP Business Group**
 Accenture and SAP have a longstanding relationship that extends more than 40 years. As the leading Nordic SAP transformation partner, we work with SAP end-to-end from product innovation to development and delivery. Together, we are revolutionizing the future of business through major SAP transformation programs with some of the biggest companies.
   

  

 Within our Nordic SAP community, we work with the newest SAP solutions and offerings such as SAP S/4, SAP BTP, SAP Business Data Cloud, Datasphere, SAP Analytics Cloud, HANA, BW/4, and SAP RISE.
   

  

 We are now looking to expand our community at scale and are looking at candidates for several positions and seniority levels.
   

  

 To read more about our SAP Practice, visit us at https://www.accenture.com/us-en/services/sap-index
   

  

**What’s in it for you:**
- Work with some of the biggest SAP clients in large global implementation projects.

- Be a valuable member of our Nordic SAP Analytics group and contribute to thought leadership, competence development and sales initiatives.

- Significant development opportunities and support for progressing in your professional career; technical, functional and as a leader.

- A dedicated mentor to guide you during your work with continuous feedback.

- Being part of our culture and core values in a truly human work environment.

- Competitive compensation and benefits.

- Access to comprehensive tools and frameworks supported by our global organization, including implementation methodologies, knowledge databases, industry leading add-on software, expert networks and benchmarks.

**As a junior Analytics professional in Accenture, you will:**
- Work closely together with clients to help them get real value out of their data by embedding Analytics into their business processes, utilizing standard SAP S/4 apps, enhancements and custom development.

- Get to work on S4 Analytics extensibility, Data warehouse development in solutions like Business Data Cloud, Datasphere, and BW/4HANA, hybrid scenarios leveraging data lake/lakehouse solutions, planning scenarios and frontend development in solutions like SAP Analytics Cloud.

- Be able to grow your professional skills within analytics, big data and AI.

- Help clients’ sustainability agenda through cutting-edge analytics.

**Required Qualifications**
- Knowledge about Analytics technologies, such as ERP embedded analytics, data warehouse solutions, data lake/lakehouse and frontend reporting/visualization tools

- Functional knowledge of business processes or interest to learn in order to maximize the value clients will get out of their Analytics solutions.

- Strong analytical skills, result-oriented paired with highly structured working style and good sense of responsibility, flexibility, and team player

- Willingness and ability to quickly learn new concepts and technologies

- Passionate about innovation and delivery of the latest technologies to your clients

- Excellent communication (verbal and written) and presentation skills to address technical and non-technical audiences in English and Nordic language

- M.Sc. or B.Sc. in Business or Engineering, such as Computer Science or Mathematics/Statistics

**Preferred Qualifications**
- Experience with SAP Analytics technologies such as S/4 Analytics Extensibility, SAP Business Data Cloud, SAP Analytics Cloud (reporting & planning), Datasphere, BW/4 or HANA

- Experience working with cross-functional teams/stakeholders in an international and fast-moving environment

- Experience with data lake/lakehouse solutions

- Experience with AI technologies

- Norwegian/Swedish/Danish speaking

title: Postdoctoral studies in RNA Biology and Genomics (scholarship)
description:
****Do you want to contribute to top quality medical research?****




 The Department of Microbiology, Tumor and Cell Biology (MTC) at Karolinska Institutet conducts research and teaching within immunology, infection biology, cell biology and cancer. Our key words are multidisciplinary, bridging, national and international collaborations.
   

  





 Vicente Pelechano’s research group combines experimental and computational work, and aims to develop and apply novel genome-wide techniques to address fundamental biological questions with medical implications. We are especially interested in how subtle variations in gene expression can lead to differential cellular phenotypes and are passionate about RNA biology (http://pelechanolab.com/). You will have the opportunity to work in a highly interdisciplinary and international environment and combine the development of state-of-the art genome-wide approaches with the molecular dissection of fundamental biological problems.
   

  





 Are you interested in the crosstalk between transcription, ribosome dynamics and mRNA decay? Would you like to develop cutting-edge genome-wide technologies to study the crosstalk across gene regulatory layers?
   

  





****Division****




 Our laboratory is located at the Science for Life Laboratory division from MTC (SciLifeLab, http://www.scilifelab.se/) in the Karolinska Institute campus. SciLifeLab is equiped with state-of-the-art instrumentation and core facilities. Our division is committed to advancing scientific knowledge and developing cutting- edge technologies in the fields of molecular biology, genomics, and bioinformatics.
   

  





****Duties****




 The available postdoctoral position concerns developing and applying novel experimental and computational approaches to study mRNA post-transcriptional regulation and ribosome dynamics. The candidate will focus on the study of the crosstalk across regulatory layers of gene expression, from chromatin and transcription to ribosome dynamics and mRNA decay. The candidate will study gene expression regulation in response to environmental and drug perturbations using novel genomic tools that our laboratory has previously developed. The candidate will perform original research in genomics and computational biology, and acquire the required experimental and computational skills necessary for the completion of the project. The candidate will use multiple model organisms, from bacteria to fungi and mammalian cell lines. The candidate is expected to communicate the scientific results by writing up scientific papers and attending scientific meetings. The ideal candidate will participate in the general duties of the team and effectively communicate with scientists of very diverse backgrounds in a highly interdisciplinary and international environment. Working language is English.
   

  





****Entry requirements****




 Postdoctoral scholarships may be established for foreign researchers who pursue their merit in Sweden. A foreign researcher is a person living in another country who comes to Sweden with the intention of only staying in Sweden for all or part of their postdoctoral education at KI. Persons who are resident in Sweden and/or have carried out all or part of their academic education at KI or some other educational institution in Sweden cannot be considered for scholarships. The purpose of scholarships for postdoctoral qualification is to promote internationalization and contribute to research qualification after a doctorate or equivalent.
 
 A scholarship for carrying out postdoctoral research can be granted for a maximum of two years within a four-year period following the receipt of a doctoral degree or equivalent.
 
 To be eligible for a postdoctoral scholarship, the person must have obtained a doctorate, or a foreign degree deemed to be equivalent to a doctorate. Applicants who have not completed a doctorate at the end of the application period may also apply, provided that all requirements for a completed degree are met before the (intended) start date of the post-doctoral education.
   

  





***In addition to the aforementioned requirements for the position***
*:* 



* Experience interpreting biological data and possess a strong interest in interdisciplinary technology development.
* Extensive experience with the molecular dissection of gene expression and associated technologies.
* Candidates should have a high-quality publications, good knowledge of English (spoken and written) and motivation to study underlying mechanisms of gene regulation in eukaryotes and prokaryotes.
* Good understanding of eukaryotic gene expression is essential, with a focus on gene expression regulation in S. cerevisiae. This includes experience in molecular biology and mechanistic dissection of the transcription and/or translation process.
* Experience interpreting biological data and experimentally testing their hypothesis.
* Documented experience with large-scale analyses and bioinformatics (NGS, Python, batch and/or R scripting languages).
* Good interpersonal skills and ability to work in teams is essential.



 In the appointment, special weight will be attached to scientific skill of relevance to the project and to previous research experience.
   

  





***In addition to the aforementioned requirements for the position***
*:* 



* Experience in RNA biology, with focus in transcriptional regulation, RNA export and/or mRNA posttranscriptional life.
* Experience in yeast genetics and molecular biology tools.



 A strong interest in interdisciplinary technology development, and novel and creative thinking abilities are essential.
   

  





***Meritorious for the position***
*:* 



* *Previous experience and training in bioinformatics and NGS data analysis.*



****What do we offer?****




 A creative and inspiring environment with wide-ranging expertise and interests. Karolinska Institutet is one of the world's leading medical universities. Here, we conduct innovative medical research and provide the largest range of biomedical education in Sweden. At KI, you get to meet researchers working with a wide range of specialisms and methods, giving you ample opportunity to exchange knowledge and experience with the various scientific fields within medicine and health. It is the crossover collaborations, which have pushed KI to where it is today, at the forefront of global research. Several of the people you meet in healthcare are educated at KI. A close relationship with the health care providers is important for creating groundbreaking top quality education and research. Students and employees have free access to our modern gym facilities with trained staff on site.
   

  





**Location:** 
 Solna
   

  





****Type of scholarship****




 The amount is tax free and it is set for twelve months at a time, paid out on a six months basis. In exceptional cases, shorter periods may be acceptable.
   

  





****Application process****




 An application must contain the following documents in English or Swedish:
 


* A complete curriculum vitae, including date of the thesis defence, title of the thesis, previous academic positions, academic title, current position, academic distinctions, and committee work
* A complete list of publications
* A summary of current work (no more than one page)



 The application is to be submitted on the Varbi recruitment system.
   

  





****Want to make a difference? Join us and contribute to better health for all****

title: Growth Analytics Lead - Vitamin Well Group
description:
*At* 
***Vitamin Well Group,***
*we provide great-tasting drinks, snacks, and protein products. Our brands Vitamin Well, NOCCO, and Barebells are available across most of Europe, North America, the MENA region, and parts of Asia Pacific. With a revenue of 650 million euros, we operate in over 40 markets, with headquarters in Stockholm and offices in fourteen countries around the world.*
**About the role**
 We are looking for an analytical and business-minded
 **Growth Analytics Lead** 
 to take ownership of how we measure, understand and improve our digital marketing and growth efforts.
   

  

 This role is central to our digital strategy and touches everything from brand awareness and paid performance, to user behaviour, conversion and customer value over time. You will be an analytics partner to the marketing, growth and e-commerce teams, helping to shape how we define success, make sense of our data and turn insights into decisions that move the business forward.
   

  

**In this role, you will:**
* Bring together and structure marketing data across channels, including organic & paid social, performance marketing, site & e-commerce and CRM
* Analyse user behaviour across digital touchpoints, from traffic and engagement to conversion and customer lifetime value
* Define how we measure success at each stage of the customer journey, including tests and growth initiatives
* Build KPI frameworks, dashboards and analyses
* Ensure data quality, structure and shared definitions across teams
* Apply AI to automate analysis, surface insights and improve decision-making across marketing and growth analytics
* Turn complex data into insights that help the business make better decisions


 The role focuses on analytics, measurement and insights within marketing, growth and e-commerce. It’s a role for someone who enjoys both strategic thinking and hands-on analytics.
   

  

**Who you are**
 You are analytical and structured, with a clear ability to turn complex data into relevant insights that support decision-making. You are comfortable owning analytical questions end-to-end — from defining what to measure, to translating insights into clear recommendations and actions.
   

  

 You communicate confidently with teams and senior stakeholders, and are comfortable challenging assumptions when needed. You also bring a natural curiosity for better ways of working, including how AI and automation can be applied to improve analysis, insight generation and decision-making.
   

  

**What you will bring:**
* 6-8+ years of experience within analytics for marketing, growth or e-commerce
* A strong understanding of the full customer journey, from acquisition to long-term value
* Hands-on experience working with GA4 and modern BI/analytics platforms (e.g. Looker, Power BI, Tableau, Funnel.io or similar)
* Experience from digital, e-commerce and/or growth-oriented environments - startup or scaleup experience is a plus


**Welcome with your application at the latest March 27nd 2026.**
*We will review applications on an ongoing basis and the position may be filled before the last application day. We appreciate LinkedIn, but to get a full picture of your experience, we ask you to also include a CV.*
**Life at Vitamin Well Group**
 Our growing family is made up of over 600 employees, representing a variety of cultures, experiences and diverse backgrounds. This diversity is a great asset as we continue our expansion and evolve our portfolio. At the same time, Vitamin Well is still very much a Swedish company, promoting Swedish values when it comes to both business and people. We treat each other in a fair and equal way, and we respect one another based on our qualities. As we expand Vitamin Well Group’s business, we are also committed to minimizing our environmental impact and continuously strive to lower emissions from for example production, logistics, and packaging.
   

  

 Working at Vitamin Well, we provide a dynamic environment defined by ambition, dedication, and an entrepreneurial spirit. In our action-oriented culture, the ability to make swift decisions is paramount in bringing ideas to fruition. We are committed to fostering an atmosphere where every individual's unique strengths contribute to our collective success. As a health and exercise-oriented company, we inspire an active lifestyle by partnering with top-performing athletes, but we also promote and support exercise among our employees.
   

  

*As part of the recruitment process, we may ask you to conduct a personality test as well as a test that measures logical ability. The purpose of the tests is to evaluate candidates as objective as possible and identify the best possible match for the role. The tests are based on solid research and are taken through our partner Alva Labs.*

title: Senior Workplace Experience Coordinator
description:
**Description**
*Position at LeoVegas Group*
**About The Role**
 As our Senior Workplace Experience Coordinator, you will be an essential part of a dynamic and dedicated Workplace Experience Team committed to delivering an exceptional day-to-day experience for all employees, visitors, and guests. This will be a full time role in the office, Monday to Friday, to support our colleague's experience. Acting as the Ambassador for the office and the first point of contact at our Stockholm HQ, you’ll play a vital role in ensuring the workplace runs smoothly, safely, and meets the demands of providing the ideal environment for both current and upcoming employees.
   

  

 In this role, you will handle a variety of responsibilities that have a direct impact on the overall workplace experience - from managing reception duties and coordinating meeting spaces to supporting internal events and collaborating with departments such as HR, the Global Workplace Experience Team, Employer Branding and IT. You’ll have the chance to contribute to exciting office-wide initiatives and process improvements, ensuring smooth operations and enhancing employee satisfaction. You will be a creative problem solver who maintains clear and friendly communication with staff and vendors, ensuring timely responses and high-quality follow-ups.
   

  

 This is a fantastic opportunity for someone with a growth mindset, who thrives in a fast-paced setting, enjoys being at the heart of the action, is ready to make a meaningful difference every day, manages tight deadlines, and is ready to take on increasing responsibilities as they arise.
   

  

 YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:
   

  

* Serving as the primary Ambassador for employees, visitors, and vendors with a warm, professional, and approachable manner.
* Managing incoming calls, emails, and deliveries efficiently and with attention to detail.
* Managing business travel arrangements for LeoVegas Group employees and company guests, ensuring seamless coordination and high standards.
* Leading the relocation process for new starters, ensuring a welcoming and structured onboarding experience.
* Ensuring office facilities are maintained to the expected standard by anticipating needs and taking initiative in resolving logistical challenges.
* Managing incoming communications and deliveries efficiently, ensuring clear follow-up with all stakeholders.
* Coordinating meeting room bookings and ensuring all spaces are well-prepared and presentable at all times.
* Overseeing stock levels for groceries and office supplies, managing orders and related expenses with attention to detail.
* Supporting office operations and internal events, displaying a positive attitude toward change and quick problem-solving.
* Maintaining front desk procedures and security protocols for access and visitor management.
* Partnering with the Senior Workplace Experience Manager to implement workplace projects and engagement activities across our Swedish offices (Stockholm, Växjö, Västerås).


 OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE THE FOLLOWING:
   

  

 Essential Skills:
   

  

* Previous experience in a front desk, office coordination, or high-level administrative support role.
* Exceptional communication skills with a service-oriented mindset and the ability to build strong relationships with vendors and staff.
* Proven ability to multitask and stay organized while managing tight deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
* A proactive and creative approach to problem-solving, with a focus on attention to detail.
* Proficiency with Microsoft Office / Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, etc.).
* Knowledge of health & safety and workplace compliance standards to ensure a safe environment.
* Strong organizational and project management capabilities with a drive to improve existing processes.


 Nice to Have:
   

  

* A growth mindset and an eagerness to take on more responsibilities as the organization evolves.
* Experience working in a tech or fast-growing international company.
* Background supporting hybrid workplace environments and multi-site organizations.
* Experience in event planning, internal engagement, or basic budget management.
* Familiarity with workplace analytics or employee feedback tools.


**Who We Are**
 At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 2000 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 19 offices worldwide.
   

  

**Benefits**
* 4 weeks of Workation (T&C apply)
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enrol in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts


 JOIN US!
   

  

 In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!
   

  

 Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!
   

  

 \*\*As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please\*\*

title: Student Assistant, Marketing Cooking - Solna
description:
Are you a student ready to put your skills to work in a high-performing, International FMCG environment? Do you want to work in a highly collaborative and business-driven team, working with market-leading and much-loved brands in Sweden? We are now looking for an ambitious colleague to join our Arla Sweden Marketing team in Stockholm (Solna Head Office) as a Student Assistant in our Cooking Team.
   

  

**How You Will Make An Impact**
 As a Student Assistant (15–20 hours per week), you’ll take on a broad role – It can be anything from consumer analysis, updating packaging designs and/or project managing new product launches to supporting brand campaigns and activation. Working across various internal functions as well as external partners, you will have exposure to multiple stakeholders in the industry.
   

  

 We expect that you are currently studying a B.Sc or M.Sc within e.g. Economics, Marketing, Innovation, Business, Communication or similar. A commercial interest is preferable and below areas is an advantage.
   

  

* Analytical skills and data driven
* Project Management and work structure
* Knowledge with IT software, such as excel and PowerPoint.


**What Will Make You Successful**
 We welcome students of all backgrounds. You are ambitious, thrive with challenges, and have a high energy level suited to a fast-paced environment. You bring a growth mindset, business interest, and passion for people & culture.
   

  

 In terms of experience, you probably have the following
   

  

* Currently following Bachelor’s or Master’s studies in xxx.
* At least 1 year of studies completed and at least two semesters remaining.
* A learning mindset; comfortable with both routine and ad hoc tasks.
* Excellent command of Swedish and English both spoken and written.


**What do we offer?**
* Student Assistant position, 15–20 hours per week.
* Fixed-term contract of 11 months, starting August 2026 until June 2027.


 As a student at Arla Foods, you can join the Arla Young Community. This vibrant and diverse community connects talented Student Assistants and Interns, offering networking opportunities, knowledge sharing, and possibilities for personal development. Connect with like-minded individuals, gain insights from experienced professionals, and participate in exciting events. Grow both personally and professionally during your time as an Intern at Arla Foods.
   

  

 Arla Foods has collective agreements and offers competitive working conditions. Safety and working environment are top priorities, including random drug and alcohol testing.
   

  

**Would you like to join us?**
 We are reviewing applications on an ongoing basis and we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. Please note applications or CVs via email or direct messages will not be accepted.
   

  

**Shape the Future of Dairy**
 Arla is a global leader in the dairy industry, committed to enabling good food choices that make life better, providing people with natural, sustainable nourishment, while taking care at every step to ensure Arla is a choice they can feel good about. If you are looking to shape the future with an ambitious global cooperative that truly cares about your growth, where everyone feels valued and empowered, and collaboration is the core of culture, Arla is a choice you can feel good about.

title: Production Site Finance Business Partner - Kallhäll
description:
At Arla Foods, we are committed to producing high-quality dairy products with a strong focus on efficiency and continuous improvement. Our Stockholm dairy is a dedicated fresh milk production site striving for operational and financial excellence. You will be based at the site in Kallhäll, Stockholm.
   

  

**How You Will Make An Impact**
 As the Finance Business Partner for the production site in Kallhäll, you will be a financial sparring partner and key member of the Management Team.
   

  

 In this pivotal role, you will drive both operational and strategic initiatives, leveraging your insights to ana-lyse, communicate, and navigate site performance in line with our ambitious goals. By closely monitoring results, you will maintain a comprehensive overview of financial performance, challenge the status quo, and help set and achieve targets that strengthen efficiency and the bottom line. As the trusted owner of the numbers and key point of contact, you will act as an advisor on all financial and strategic matters, en-suring transparency, consistency, and the sharing of vital knowledge and best practices across the sites. This is a unique opportunity to make a significant impact on our operations and champion continuous im-provement at Arla Foods.
   

  

 As Site Finance Business Partner your major responsibilities will be
   

  

* Performance Communication & Operational Efficiency Clearly communicate financial performance across the organization, ensuring transparency and a shared understanding of site results, while proactively driving operational efficiency and continuous improvement in performance.
* Trusted Advisor Act as a strategic sparring partner and advisor, providing robust financial analysis, business cases, and fact-based recommendations to inform decision-making.
* Ownership of Numbers Serve as the ultimate owner of site financials, ensuring up-to-date fore-casts, transparency, and consistency in numbers to drive effective, forward-looking performance dialogues with a strong focus on net efficiency.
* Key Point of Contact Be the ONE point of contact bridging support functions and critical business functions, acting as a trusted financial advisor and helping to set the direction for the sites.


 You will join a strong and devoted finance team and work in close cooperation with your colleagues at the other production sites across our network. You will be involved in projects, analyses, performance man-agement, best practice and other relevant tasks.
   

  

**What Will Make You Successful**
 To be successful in this role, we believe you have a degree in economics and previous experience as a Fi-nance Business Partner or Controller. Experience within production or logistics finance is a plus. You are expected to work confidently within the Microsoft Office package, and it would be advantageous if you are familiar with SAP and Business Warehouse Solutions, though this is not a requirement. Furthermore, you are fluent in English.
   

  

 You are a people-oriented person with a curious mindset that drives you to explore new possibilities. Your business acumen and analytical skills help you navigate and solve complex challenges. You thrive in an en-vironment of constant change and are a reliable, passionate ambassador for Arla’s strategy and vision. You foster a work environment built on trust and respect, and you are comfortable using your personal power and persistence to drive your ideas forward.
   

  

**What do we offer?**
 We’re committed to professional development and promoting from within. Our positive and collaborative culture will bring out the best in you. And you’ll join a market leader who produces nutritious household favorite brands in a way that make things better for our customers, the farmers who own us, and the whole world.
   

  

 Arla Foods has collective agreements, and we always ensure to offer good and competitive working condi-tions. In addition to that, safety and working environment are our top priorities, which is why we, among other things, conduct random drug and alcohol tests.
   

  

 Arla Supply Chain - Pride in every drop of milk.
   

  

**Would you like to join us?**
 We review applications on an ongoing basis and would like to receive your application as soon as possible. For more information about the role, contact Senior Finance Manager, Stefan Lantz at stlaz@arlafoods.com.
   

  

 Please note that applications or CVs sent via email or direct messages will not be accepted or considered.
   

  

**Shape the Future of Dairy**
 Arla is a global leader in the dairy industry, committed to enabling good food choices that make life better, providing people with natural, sustainable nourishment, while taking care at every step to ensure Arla is a choice they can feel good about. If you are looking to shape the future with an ambitious global cooperative that truly cares about your growth, where everyone feels valued and empowered, and collaboration is the core of culture, Arla is a choice you can feel good about.

title: Diabetessköterska till Segeltorps vårdcentral
description:
Vill du arbeta som diabetessköterska på en välfungerande och trivsam vårdcentral med engagerade kollegor och hög medicinsk kvalitet? Då kan du vara den vi söker!
   

  





**Segeltorps vårdcentral** 
 är en regiondriven vårdcentral belägen i ett äldre villaområde i Huddinge kommun, cirka fem minuter med buss från Fruängen. Vi har cirka 7 200 listade patienter, varav många är äldre. Vår hemsjukvård är välordnad och omfattar cirka 55 inskrivna patienter.
   

  





 Hos oss arbetar cirka 25 medarbetare i ett tryggt och sammansvetsat team bestående av läkare, distriktssköterskor, sjuksköterskor, psykolog, psykoterapeut, medicinsk fotvårdare, geriatriker, undersköterskor, REKO och medicinska sekreterare. Vi arbetar nära varandra och har en välutvecklad samverkan med andra aktörer inom nära vård. Många av oss har arbetat här länge och vi är stolta över vår verksamhet och den vård vi bedriver.
   

  





 Vi värdesätter en hållbar arbetsmiljö, professionell gemenskap och kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling. Vår ambition är att erbjuda invånarna god och säker vård med hög medicinsk kvalitet.
   

  





**Om tjänsten**




 Tjänsten innefattar sedvanliga arbetsuppgifter för diabetessköterska med egen mottagning inom primärvård i form av mottagningsarbete med planerade och akuta besök, telefonrådgivning, vaccinationsarbete samt planering, hantering och uppföljning i journalsystemet TakeCare. 
   

  





 Du kommer att ha en viktig roll i omhändertagandet av våra patienter med diabetes och vara en del av vårt fortsatta utvecklingsarbete inom primärvården.
   

  





**Vi söker dig som**




 Är legitimerad sjuksköterska med specialistutbildning inom diabetes minst 30 hp i diabetesvård
 **eller** 
 distriktssköterska med minst 7,5 hp i diabetesvård. Har goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift samt vana av att arbeta i olika IT-system. 
   

  





 Det är meriterande om du har några års erfarenhet i yrket samt erfarenhet från primärvård och/eller telefonrådgivning. Det är önskvärt att du har körkort. 
   

  





 För att trivas hos oss är du trygg, stabil och flexibel. Du har god självinsikt och förmåga att anpassa dig när förutsättningarna förändras – något som är en naturlig del av vardagen i primärvården.
   

  





 Du är kommunikativ, lyhörd och trivs med att arbeta i team. Samtidigt har du förmåga att arbeta självständigt, planera, organisera och prioritera ditt arbete på ett effektivt sätt. Du har ett respektfullt bemötande, är ödmjuk och ser värdet i att sätta dig in i patienters och anhörigas perspektiv.
   

  





 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet.
   

  





**Vi erbjuder** 



* Ett nära och stöttande team med hög kompetens.
* En stabil och välfungerande verksamhet.
* Möjlighet att vara med och utveckla framtidens nära vård.
* En arbetsplats där arbetsmiljö och kvalitet står i fokus.



 SLSO skapar goda förutsättningar för att du som medarbetare ska utvecklas och bli riktigt bra inom din profession. Som medarbetare har du förmåner såsom fri sjukvård, extra ersättning vid föräldraledighet, möjlighet till löneväxling, avtalspension samt försäkringar. Du kan läsa mer om det på: Förmåner hos Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde (regionstockhlm.se)
   

  





**Anställningsform**




 Tillsvidareanställning 100%. Deltid kan erbjudas.
   

 Provanställning kan komma att tillämpas.
   

 Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  





 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan och bli en del av vårt engagerade team på Segeltorps vårdcentral!
   

  





 Tjänsten tillsätts under förutsättning att den inte behöver tas i anspråk för intern omplacering, enligt gällande regelverk.
   

  

  

  

**Vid patientnära arbete inom Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde:**
  

 - tillämpas registerkontroll före beslut om anställning enligt SLSO:s övergripande anvisning för registerkontroll vid anställning.
   

  

 - ska medarbetare som kommer att ha patientkontakt genomgå nyanställningsundersökning, enligt gällande direktiv, vilket sker genom företagshälsovården innan anställning.
   

  

 - krävs, förutom svensk yrkeslegitimation, goda kunskaper i svenska språket motsvarande nivå C1 enligt den gemensamma europeiska referensramen (GERS). Samma krav är vägledande vad gäller icke-legitimerad personal med patientkontakt.
   

  

  

  

**Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde (SLSO) är en av Sveriges största vårdgivare med 11 600 medarbetare. Vi erbjuder hälso- och sjukvård i Region Stockholms regi inom psykiatri, primärvård, geriatrik, ASIH, närakuter, somatisk specialistvård, habilitering och hälsa samt hjälpmedel. I samverkan med Karolinska Institutet bedriver vi forskning, utbildning och utveckling. Läs mer om SLSO här.**




****Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm****




 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  





 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  





 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  





 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  





 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

title: Global Reward Manager
description:
**Last date to apply:**
 09 March 2026
   

  

**We’re one of the world’s oldest start-ups — and we’re just getting started.**
 At Husqvarna Group, innovation is in our DNA. With over 330 years of heritage and a passion for pioneering technology, we design and deliver world‑class products and solutions for forest, park, garden, and construction care. From robotic lawn mowers to cutting‑edge chainsaws and sustainable battery systems, we’re shaping the future — and we want you to be part of it.
   

  

**About The Team**
 This role sits within Total Rewards and strengthens our global reward organisation with deeper technical expertise while operating closely under the direction of our VP Total Rewards. You will collaborate with senior stakeholders across the global business as well as Finance, Legal and local HR teams ensuring global alignment and delivery of our reward strategy.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As Global Reward Manager, you will take a leading role in building our global benefits and pension framework, while driving in-depth analysis of our incentive programs and supporting high-quality material for the People Committee (Remuneration Committee).
   

  

 This is a senior role requiring deep technical expertise within total rewards. You will combine strategic oversight with hands-on execution, ensuring initiatives are delivered with rigor, clarity, and impact. We are looking for someone who knows the reward domain thoroughly, communicates confidently with senior stakeholders, and consistently brings initiatives to completion. You will be a central enabler of our global reward agenda, with particular focus on benefits development, incentive program analytics, executive remuneration, and EU pay transparency compliance.
   

  

**Key responsibilities include:**
 Benefits & Pension
   

  

* Lead the global roll-out of the AON agreement and manage annual renewal cycles
* Do a global pension inventory and provide recommendations for the continuous work with global pension management
* Conduct benchmarking and provide data-driven recommendations
* Build and govern the global benefits roadmap and ensure program effectiveness


 Reward Design & Analytics
   

  

* Drive advanced reward analytics including KPI frameworks, cost modelling, and STI/LTI scenario simulations
* Lead pay gap analytics and job architecture calibration processes
* Prepare reward insights and decision material for Group Management and the People Committee


 Executive Remuneration
   

  

* Support design and governance of Tier 2 executive remuneration frameworks including contracts


 EU Pay Transparency (Operational Lead)
   

  

* Lead implementation to ensure full compliance by YE 2026
* Establish governance, reporting structures, and country-level guidelines


**About You**
 You are a senior reward professional with deep expertise in pensions, benefits, and incentive design. You combine analytical precision with business judgment and strong stakeholder management skills. You are comfortable engaging with senior leadership and preparing high-quality material for executive forums. You communicate complex reward topics clearly and confidently. Most importantly, you are delivery-oriented. You take ownership, drive initiatives across functions and geographies, and ensure that projects are completed with structure and quality.
   

  

**Your Skills And Background**
* Extensive experience within global Total Rewards
* Strong technical depth in benefits, pensions, and incentive structures (STI/LTI)
* Solid experience in financial modelling and reward analytics
* Experience supporting executive remuneration and governance processes
* Strong project management capability in complex, multi-country environments


**Location**
 This position will be placed in one of our main sites in Huskvarna or Stockholm. Also Malmö is a possible location. With our hybrid working environment, you’ll have the flexibility to work both onsite and remotely, promoting work‑life balance for all team members. We meet in the office at least 2–3 days a week (50%).
   

  

**Your Application**
 Can you envision yourself being a part of this? If so, send us your application! We are screening on an ongoing basis and will close this recruitment as soon as we have found the right person.
   

  

 For more information about the position, contact hiring manager Annika Erkselius, VP Total rewards, on Annika.Erkselius@husqvarnagroup.com. For questions regarding the process, please contact Head of Talent Acquisition, Eva Bexelius on eva.bexelius@husqvarnagroup.com.
   

  

**Winning Through Culture**
 At Husqvarna Group, you'll find an international, inclusive, and diverse environment with plenty of opportunities for personal and professional growth. We believe our differences are our strengths, and we live a culture based on three pillars:
 **We’re Bold, We’re Dedicated,** 
 and
 **We Care**
 Learn more about our culture
 *here* 
 .

title: Chef De Partie
description:
Dream Big - Join Villa Valentina!
   

  

 Urban Italian Group is launching Villa Valentina, a modern Spanish farmhouse restaurant with Mediterranean influences, opening in Slussen, Stockholm May 2026. The restaurant is UIG’s love letter to the Southern Mediterranean coast , inspired by Spanish farmhouses and defined by passion and love for social dining.
   

  

 Villa Valentina is about sharing experiences and laughter with your friends and loved ones. We focus on a social, shareable dining experience, genuine hospitality, carefully selected ingredients and a menu designed to be enjoyed together, creating a warm and lively restaurant with personality at its core.
   

  

 Set in the new heart of Slussen, Villa Valentina will be one of Scandinavia´s most significant openings, a large-scale, high-exposure venue designed for very high volume, with up to 350 seats during the summer season.
   

  

**Our Restaurants**
**Basta** 
 Instagram - A casual dining concept delivering great guest with strong value for guests.
   

  

**Florentine** 
 Instagram Sweden | Instagram Spain - An international upscale casual trattoria delivering refined dining.
   

  

**Trattoria Giorgio's** 
 Instagram - A lively 1960s Milanese trattoria in Östermalm.
   

  

**Lola Maria** 
 Instagram - Vibrant Andalusian tapas, in the heart of Malmö.
   

  

**Villa Valentina** 
 Instagram - Modern Spanish farm house concept with mediterranean influences. Opening June 2026.
   

  

**About You & The Role**
 This role is for a Chef de Partie who takes pride in doing things properly and seeing the result over time.
   

  

 You will work in a structured kitchen with clear standards and high volume. The days are busy and sometimes repetitive, but the satisfaction comes from mastering the details, keeping quality high under pressure, and knowing your section runs well because of you.
   

  

 Progress here doesn’t come from fast titles or constant change. It comes from consistency, feedback, and taking responsibility day after day. People who do well enjoy being trusted with real ownership, improving through repetition, and being part of a team where standards matter.
   

  

 If you like responsibility, clear expectations, and the feeling of finishing a service knowing you did the job properly, this environment will suit you.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own your section & lead your colleagues within your section
* Prepare and cook dishes according to recipes and quality standards
* Ensure mise en place is completed up to standards, and organised before service
* Maintain consistency, speed, and precision during service
* Keep your section clean, organised, and service-ready at all times
* Communicate clearly with the kitchen team during service
* Support colleagues and contribute to a positive team environment
* Ensure full compliance of company's HACCP


**Key Requirements**
* Proven experience in a similar role within a fast-paced kitchen
* Strong communication and leadership skills
* Excellent organisational skills and ability to work under time pressure
* Good knowledge of food safety and hygiene regulations
* Ability to work independently while contributing to team success
* Ability to consistently deliver high-quality dishes in a high-volume environment


**Benefits**
 Our team is full of big hearted and incredibly talented colleagues who will make sure you feel very welcomed from day one.
   

  

* Competitive market salary + tips
* Average of 40 hours a week
* Housing (T&Cs applies)
* Seasonal and permanent contracts
* 5000SEK referral bonus scheme for introducing a successful colleague
* Best on the market growth opportunities
* Regular performance reviews and salary evaluations
* Full onboarding, cross training and tailored career development plan
* The unforgettable annual UIG Gala party and team nights out
* International trips and possibility to work abroad
* Friends for life


 What We Offer
   

  

 Joining Urban Italian Group means becoming part of a vibrant, forward-thinking family where creativity meets collaboration:
   

  

* Growth & Vision: Be at the forefront of developing one of Scandinavia’s fastest-growing hospitality brands.
* Leadership Impact: Inspire and influence a dynamic team, leaving your mark on operations across multiple brands.
* Competitive Rewards: Enjoy a market-leading salary paired with performance-based bonuses.
* Professional Development: Access resources and training designed to elevate your culinary and leadership expertise.
* A Strong and Supportive Foundation: With our dedicated team behind you, cultivate a positive and thriving kitchen environment.

title: Senior React Native Engineer (Stockholm, EU only)
description:
Anyfin is building the next generation of consumer finance. We’re profitable, scaling quickly and now operating with a banking license which opens up a lot of technical complexity.
   

  

 We’re looking for a senior react native engineer who enjoys moving fast, taking real ownership and building things that actually have an impact. We work from the office because we think it makes us better, especially at this stage.
   

  

 If that sounds like your kind of environment, keep reading. Because honestly, it’s not a role for everyone.
   

  

**Small team, high responsibility**
 We hire carefully. We’re not a company that grows by adding headcount everywhere, we grow by keeping the bar high and building a team where every person matters.
   

  

 This isn’t a place where you disappear into a big org. If you join, you’ll have real influence on what we build and how we build it.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 You’ll take a leading role in building and evolving our mobile applications across iOS and Android.
   

  

* Building and shipping new mobile features in React Native
* Designing reusable components and scalable mobile architecture
* Collaborating closely with design to deliver polished, accessible user interfaces
* Integrating with our GraphQL APIs to power seamless user experiences
* Making architectural decisions that improve performance, maintainability and developer experience
* Running experiments and iterating on features to improve user engagement and retention
* Writing and maintaining automated tests to ensure reliability across releases
* Mentoring other engineers and helping raise the bar for mobile development


 Our main stack includes React Native, TypeScript, GraphQL, Storybook and GrowthBook.
   

  

**How We Think About Building**
 We’re pragmatic. We like speed, but we also care about building things that last.
   

  

 We’re also actively working towards becoming more AI-native in how we work. Not as hype, but as a way to iterate faster and spend less time on repetitive stuff.
   

  

 We’re looking for engineers who are curious about that shift and want to be part of it, rather than people who feel like good engineering means doing everything the hard way.
   

  

 No ego. Just good judgment and high output.
   

  

**You’ll thrive here if you…**
* Have strong experience building mobile apps with React Native
* Care about craftsmanship, performance and user experience
* Take responsibility naturally and don’t wait to be told what to do
* Enjoy collaborating closely with design and product
* Like being part of an ambitious team working together in the office
* Want to build and improve products, not just maintain them


**You’re Comfortable With Things Like**
* React Native and modern TypeScript-based development
* Mobile architecture and reusable component design
* API integrations (GraphQL or REST)
* Testing strategies for mobile applications
* Shipping real products to real users


**A few practical notes**
* Stockholm and office-based, because we believe that great products and culture are better built when you meet in person
* EU work authorization required


**Why Anyfin?**
 Because this is one of those moments where a company is about to level up: Banking license secured, expansion ahead and a lot to build.
   

  

 If you want to be part of a small, high-trust team doing meaningful work, we’d love to hear from you. Apply only if you want the responsibility that comes with real impact.
   

  

 Anyfin is a fintech on a mission to simplify loan repayments and improve the financial well-being of millions. We help consumers reduce the costs of high-interest loans, and take control of their repayment plan.

title: Sales Enablement Manager – Advanced Staining
description:
**Bring more to life.**
 Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics and biotechnology?
   

  

 At Leica Biosystems, one of Danaher’s 15+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangible impact.
   

  

 You’ll thrive in a culture of belonging where you and your unique viewpoint matter. And by harnessing Danaher’s system of continuous improvement, you help turn ideas into impact – innovating at the speed of life.
   

  

 At Leica Biosystems, we’re not just shaping the future of cancer diagnostics — we’re transforming lives. Our mission of “Advancing Cancer Diagnostics, Improving Lives” is the driving force behind everything we do. As a global leader with the most comprehensive portfolio spanning from biopsy to diagnosis, we empower clinicians with innovative, reliable solutions so they can give patients timely, accurate answers when they need them most. When you join Leica Biosystems, you’re not just taking a job; you’re becoming part of a passionate team that knows every moment matters when it comes to cancer. You’ll help develop diagnostic solutions that turn anxiety into answers, and aid the acceleration of next-generation, life-changing therapies. Surrounded by a diverse and collaborative global community, you’ll be inspired each day to stretch, grow, and make an impact.
   

  

 Learn about the Danaher Business System which makes everything possible.
   

  

**The Sales Enablement Manager** 
 – Advanced Staining (Indirect Markets Europe) is a role within the North European Indirect Sales organization. The position reports directly to the Senior Commercial Manager Indirect Markets and is a remote position based either in Sweden or Denmark.
   

  

 This role is responsible for accelerating growth, adoption, and execution quality of the Advanced Staining portfolio across all European indirect markets & CIS countries. The position works closely with Regional Sales Managers and distributor partners to translate strategy into field execution, support complex commercial initiatives, and drive capability building within partner organizations.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will Have The Opportunity To**
* Drive execution of the Advanced Staining strategy across indirect markets in close alignment with Regional Sales Managers and regional priorities.
* Act as a commercial enabler and sparring partner to distributors, supporting prioritization, opportunity development, and execution of strategic deals and projects.
* Lead and support strategic initiatives in selected markets, including portfolio conversions, reagent agreements, reference site development, and complex customer engagements.
* Strengthen distributor commercial capabilities, go-to-market execution, funnel quality, and forecast accuracy for Advanced Staining.
* Support budgeting, multi-year planning, and act as the interface between indirect markets, SU NEE, and BU by providing structured market and competitive feedback.


**The Essential Requirements Of The Job Include**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience.
* Strong commercial and technical experience in medical devices, diagnostics, or life sciences, preferably within indirect sales models, with a deep understanding of Immunohistochemistry, including market dynamics and underlying technology.
* Proven commercial acumen, including pricing, margins, forecasting, and tender-driven business.
* Ability to influence and operate effectively in a matrix organization without direct authority.
* Fluency in English is required as well as ability to work independently in a remote, field-based role. Proficiency in Danish or Swedish is valued.
* Proven experience in managing and developing business through indirect sales channels, including distributor and partner networks.


**Travel, & Physical / Environmental Requirements**
* Ability to travel frequently across European & CIS indirect markets, including overnight travel if needed (approximately 50%-60%).
* Valid work permit.


**It would be a plus if you also possess previous experience in:**
* Advanced Staining, histopathology, or laboratory diagnostics.
* Supporting strategic projects across multiple countries or regions.
* Working closely with commercial leadership in indirect or distributor-led environments.


 At Leica Biosystems, we believe in designing a better, more sustainable workforce. We recognize the benefits of flexible, remote working arrangements for eligible roles. This position is eligible for a remote work arrangement in which you can work remotely from your home. Additional information will be provided during the interview process.
   

  

 We review applications on an ongoing basis and look forward to hearing from you. Submit your application today – we’re excited to learn more about you!
   

  

 Join our winning team today. Together, we’ll accelerate the real-life impact of tomorrow’s science and technology. We partner with customers across the globe to help them solve their most complex challenges, architecting solutions that bring the power of science to life.
   

  

 For more information, visit www.danaher.com.

title: Specialty Leasing Manager
description:
We’re looking for a talented and commercially minded individual to join our Leasing Team as the Speciality Leasing Manager. This is a pivotal role in a fast‑paced, high‑energy environment, where you’ll help shape the retail experience across four centres in Sweden and Denmark. If you’re motivated by growth, partnership building, and bringing innovative concepts to life, this is an exciting opportunity to make a real impact.
 



  





**Key objectives** 




 The Speciality Leasing Manager will support the Senior Leasing and Speciality Leasing Manager in identifying and securing innovative, high‑potential brands; managing tenant relationships; minimising vacancy; and negotiating and closing commercial agreements across the portfolio. The role also contributes to financial analysis, reporting, and budgeting. The overarching objective is to drive income and long‑term value growth through Speciality Leasing (Mid‑Mall kiosks, Seasonal Markets, B2B Car Park income, Vending) while maintaining strong relationships with internal stakeholders.
 



  





**What you will be doing…** 



* **Identify and onboard new and exciting brands** 
 , including digitally native concepts and alternative uses, across the Swedish asset portfolio.
* **Negotiate new lettings** 
 , with support from the Line Manager, to secure strong brands that enhance the customer experience and complement the retail and service mix.
* **Manage the full leasing process** 
 from initial sourcing to signed agreement: secure internal approvals, coordinate with legal teams, and ensure a smooth path to opening.
* **Proactively pursue leads** 
 and stay informed on market trends, emerging concepts, and competitor activity within Sweden and the Nordic region.
* **Maintain and strengthen relationships with existing tenants** 
 , identifying opportunities for growth, reviewing performance, and mitigating risk.
* **Collaborate with Retail Design** 
 to optimise unit design and support the delivery process, ensuring openings are timely, safe, and aligned with brand and asset standards.
* **Work cross‑functionally** 
 with Asset Management, Centre Management, Finance, Legal, and Marketing teams.
* **Support the preparation of annual business plans** 
 , budgets, long‑term forecasts, and ongoing financial reporting in partnership with the Line Manager and Asset Teams.



  





  





**What skills, experience, and knowledge will you need to be successful?** 



* Experience within sales, retail, or the property industry, ideally with exposure to leasing or business development.
* Strong interest in retail trends, consumer behaviour, and emerging brands; confident using social media and digital platforms to identify opportunities.
* Comfortable approaching new brands, with strong negotiation and analytical skills.
* Proven ability to build and maintain successful stakeholder relationships, translating strategic objectives into long‑term partnerships.
* Confident presenting to retailers, senior management, and external partners.
* Able to clearly articulate recommendations and influence decision‑making across the organisation.
* Solid working knowledge of Excel, PowerPoint, Word and Outlook.
* Social media savvy with a genuine interest in digitally native and innovative brands.
* Ability to work independently and collaboratively, adapt quickly to changing priorities, and manage strict deadlines.
* Fluency in Swedish and English.



  





**Who are we?** 




 At Unibail-Rodamco-Westfield (URW), we develop and operate a portfolio of sustainable, premium, mixed-use real estate assets across Europe and the United States. Driven by our purpose to Reinvent Being Together, we are committed to accelerating urban regeneration and rethinking how we live together in cities. Today, 2,000 dedicated individuals are working together to reshape the future of real estate and shopping cecentresy creating innovative, engaging spaces that truly redefine community connections.
 



  





 Our flagship destinations are more than just places; they're the heartbeat of the community. We empower our employees to make a real impact through volunteering, DE&I programs, and leading ESG efforts. URW is at the forefront of experiential entertainment, constantly pushing boundaries to craft unforgettable in-person and digital experiences. By surprising and delighting our customers, we create magical moments and reinvent togetherness in every interaction.
 



  





 Within our Northern Europe Region - spanning the Netherlands, Denmark, Sweden, and the UK - we own and manage eight exceptional assets. These include Westfield Mall of the Netherlands, Stadshart Amstelveen, Westfield London, and Westfield Stratford City.
 



  





**As an international company, our primary internal language is English. Therefore, we kindly ask that you submit your application and resume in English.** 




  





**Why work for us:** 




 We put people's development and learning at the heart of what we do. We'll help you master your role, build your technical skills, and take advantage of top-notch management and leadership programs. From face-to-face workshops to our global online learning resources, we encourage you to make learning a part of your daily routine.
 



  





 We offer a fantastic bonus scheme, and many other incentives, including company health insurance is available at a reduced tariff. We offer an indefinite contract, including 6-month probation time. Our company culture centres on caring for our employees and supporting their success. With diverse roles, you won't be limited to one area but have the chance to grow a broad range of skills and experiences. We also have other great perks, such as Health care allowance is 4500 SEK per year and 6 weeks’ vacation!
 



  





 Want to know more about what it's like working at URW? Visit our site
 
 https://www.urw.com/join-us/life-at-urw
 




  





**What Matters to Us:** 




 At URW, our purpose is to
 **Reinvent Being Together** 
 , reimagining how people and communities connect, socialise, and experience dynamic moments in unique and meaningful ways.
 



  





 We are proud to promote equal opportunities and embrace diversity in profiles, experiences, and skills. At URW, we believe that diversity is the cornerstone of our success, and we are dedicated to fostering an environment that respects, values, celebrates, and leverages individual differences to their fullest potential.
 



  





 We evaluate each application with fairness and without discrimination based on disability, age, gender, origin, religion, sexual orientation, or any other legally protected characteristics. Our commitment is to provide equal access to our services for everyone. If you require any adjustments for your interview, please let us know in advance, so we can support you accordingly.
 



  





 As part of our commitment to maintaining a safe and trustworthy working environment, we conduct comprehensive security checks on all employees prior to their start date. These checks may include identity verification, employment history, and criminal record screening, in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.
 



  





**Join us and be part of a team that's making a real difference in your local communities!**

title: Projektledare utbildning och lärande
description:
Vill du jobba med ett av världens mest kända varumärken, Wikipedia? Wikimedia Sverige är den svenska stödföreningen för Wikipedia och alla de andra Wikimediaprojekten. Nu söker vi en
 **projektledare inom utbildning och lärande** 
 som vill vara med och göra Wikipedia ännu bättre. I denna roll utvecklar du utbildningsprogram som är centrala för Wikimedia Sveriges arbete med fri kunskap. Du arbetar för att öka användningen av öppna lärresurser och främja open access genom utbildning, samarbeten, nätverksbyggande och påverkansarbete.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




  





 Du kommer att utveckla pedagogiska resurser och utbildningar om Wikipedia och andra Wikimediaprojekt för olika målgrupper. Arbetet sker både genom digitala resurser – bland annat på e-learningplattformen learn.wiki – och genom praktiska utbildningar och workshops online. Du stödjer även kollegor i att ta fram pedagogiskt material i olika projekt, till exempel inför insamlingsevent.
 



  





 Ett centralt fokus under de kommande 12 månaderna är att ta fram pedagogiska planer för flera utbildningsprogram.
